37constexpr size_t kSerialLineCapacity = 384;
38constexpr size_t kMaxTokens = 48;
39constexpr size_t kMaxWordPoints = 8;
40constexpr size_t kVerificationNoteCapacity = 80;
41constexpr size_t kMaxRandomWordDevices = 8;

43constexpr size_t kMaxRandomBitDevices = 8;

52constexpr uint32_t kReconnectReportIntervalMs = 5000;

56 : 0;

102constexpr slmp::DeviceAddress kTxLimitWordDevice = {slmp::DeviceCode::D, 700};

107constexpr size_t kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount = kTxPayloadBudget >= 8U ? ((kTxPayloadBudget - 8U) / 2U) : 0U;
108constexpr size_t kTxLimitWriteDWordsMaxCount = kTxPayloadBudget >= 8U ? ((kTxPayloadBudget - 8U) / 4U) : 0U;
109constexpr size_t kTxLimitWriteBitsMaxCount = kTxPayloadBudget >= 8U ? ((kTxPayloadBudget - 8U) * 2U) : 0U;
110constexpr size_t kTxLimitWriteRandomBitsMaxCount = kTxPayloadBudget >= 1U ? ((kTxPayloadBudget - 1U) / 8U) : 0U;
111constexpr size_t kTxLimitWriteRandomWordsMaxCount = kTxPayloadBudget >= 2U ? ((kTxPayloadBudget - 2U) / 8U) : 0U;
112constexpr size_t kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints = kTxPayloadBudget >= 10U ? ((kTxPayloadBudget - 10U) / 2U) : 0U;
113static_assert(kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount > 0, "txlimit writeWords max count must be positive");
114static_assert(kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints > 0, "txlimit block max points must be positive");

116struct DeviceSpec {
117 const char* name;
118 slmp::DeviceCode code;
119 bool hex_address;
120};

122enum class VerificationKind : uint8_t {
123 None = 0,
124 WordWrite,
125 BitWrite,
126};
127
128enum class BenchMode : uint8_t {
129 None = 0,
130 Row,
131 Wow,
132 Pair,
133 Rw,
134 Ww,
135 Block,
136};
137
138enum class StreamMode : uint8_t {
139 None = 0,
140 Words,
141 DWords,
142 Bits,
143};

145enum class TransportMode : uint8_t {
146 Tcp = 0,
147 Udp,
148};

150struct BenchSummary {
151 uint32_t cycles = 0;
152 uint32_t requests = 0;
153 uint32_t fail = 0;
154 uint32_t last_cycle_ms = 0;
155 uint32_t min_cycle_ms = 0;
156 uint32_t max_cycle_ms = 0;
157 uint64_t total_cycle_ms = 0;
158 size_t last_request_bytes = 0;
159 size_t last_response_bytes = 0;
160};
161
162struct VerificationRecord {
163 bool active = false;
164 bool judged = false;
165 bool pass = false;
166 bool readback_match = false;
167 VerificationKind kind = VerificationKind::None;
168 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {slmp::DeviceCode::D, 0};
169 uint16_t points = 0;
170 uint16_t before_words[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
171 uint16_t written_words[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
172 uint16_t readback_words[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
173 bool before_bit = false;
174 bool written_bit = false;
175 bool readback_bit = false;
176 uint32_t started_ms = 0;
177 char note[kVerificationNoteCapacity] = {};
178};
179
180enum class FuncheckResult : uint8_t {
181 Ok = 0,
182 Fail,
183};
184
185struct FuncheckSummary {
186 uint32_t ok = 0;
187 uint32_t fail = 0;
188};
189
190struct EnduranceSession {
191 bool active = false;
192 uint32_t started_ms = 0;
193 uint32_t next_cycle_due_ms = 0;
194 uint32_t last_report_ms = 0;
195 uint32_t last_cycle_ms = 0;
196 uint32_t min_cycle_ms = 0;
197 uint32_t max_cycle_ms = 0;
198 uint64_t total_cycle_ms = 0;
199 uint32_t cycle_limit = 0;
200 uint32_t attempts = 0;
201 uint32_t ok = 0;
202 uint32_t fail = 0;
203 char last_step[48] = {};
204 char last_issue[64] = {};
205 slmp::Error last_error = slmp::Error::Ok;
206 uint16_t last_end_code = 0;
207};
208
209struct ReconnectSession {
210 bool active = false;
211 uint32_t started_ms = 0;
212 uint32_t next_cycle_due_ms = 0;
213 uint32_t last_report_ms = 0;
214 uint32_t last_cycle_ms = 0;
215 uint32_t min_cycle_ms = 0;
216 uint32_t max_cycle_ms = 0;
217 uint64_t total_cycle_ms = 0;
218 uint32_t cycle_limit = 0;
219 uint32_t attempts = 0;
220 uint32_t ok = 0;
221 uint32_t fail = 0;
222 uint32_t recoveries = 0;
223 uint32_t consecutive_failures = 0;
224 uint32_t max_consecutive_failures = 0;
225 char last_step[48] = {};
226 char last_issue[64] = {};
227 slmp::Error last_error = slmp::Error::Ok;
228 uint16_t last_end_code = 0;
229};
230
231struct ConsoleLinkState {
232 TransportMode transport_mode = TransportMode::Tcp;
233 slmp::FrameType frame_type = slmp::FrameType::Frame4E;
234 slmp::CompatibilityMode compatibility_mode = slmp::CompatibilityMode::iQR;
235 uint16_t plc_port = kPlcPort;
236};

282Wiznet6300lwIP Ethernet(kEthernetCsPin);
283WiFiClient tcp_client;
284slmp::ArduinoClientTransport tcp_transport(tcp_client);
285#if SLMP_ENABLE_UDP_TRANSPORT
286WiFiUDP udp_client;
287slmp::ArduinoUdpTransport udp_transport(udp_client);
288#endif
289ConsoleLinkState console_link = {};
290
291class ConsoleTransportRouter : public slmp::ITransport {
292 public:
293 ConsoleTransportRouter(
294 slmp::ArduinoClientTransport& tcp_transport,
295#if SLMP_ENABLE_UDP_TRANSPORT
296 slmp::ArduinoUdpTransport& udp_transport,
297#endif
298 ConsoleLinkState& link_state
299 )
300 : tcp_transport_(tcp_transport)
301#if SLMP_ENABLE_UDP_TRANSPORT
302 , udp_transport_(udp_transport)
303#endif
304 , link_state_(link_state) {}
305
306 bool connect(const char* host, uint16_t port) override {
307 return activeTransport().connect(host, port);
308 }
309
310 void close() override {
311 tcp_transport_.close();
312#if SLMP_ENABLE_UDP_TRANSPORT
313 udp_transport_.close();
314#endif
315 }
316
317 bool connected() const override {
318 return activeTransport().connected();
319 }
320
321 bool writeAll(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) override {
322 return activeTransport().writeAll(data, length);
323 }
324
325 bool readExact(uint8_t* data, size_t length, uint32_t timeout_ms) override {
326 return activeTransport().readExact(data, length, timeout_ms);
327 }
328
329 size_t write(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) override {
330 return activeTransport().write(data, length);
331 }
332
333 size_t read(uint8_t* data, size_t length) override {
334 return activeTransport().read(data, length);
335 }
336
337 size_t available() override {
338 return activeTransport().available();
339 }
340
341 private:
342 slmp::ITransport& activeTransport() {
343 if (link_state_.transport_mode == TransportMode::Udp) {
344#if SLMP_ENABLE_UDP_TRANSPORT
345 return udp_transport_;
346#else
347 return tcp_transport_;
348#endif
349 }
350 return tcp_transport_;
351 }
352
353 const slmp::ITransport& activeTransport() const {
354 if (link_state_.transport_mode == TransportMode::Udp) {
355#if SLMP_ENABLE_UDP_TRANSPORT
356 return udp_transport_;
357#else
358 return tcp_transport_;
359#endif
360 }
361 return tcp_transport_;
362 }
363
364 slmp::ArduinoClientTransport& tcp_transport_;
365#if SLMP_ENABLE_UDP_TRANSPORT
366 slmp::ArduinoUdpTransport& udp_transport_;
367#endif
368 ConsoleLinkState& link_state_;
369};
370
371uint8_t tx_buffer[kTxBufferSize];
372uint8_t rx_buffer[kRxBufferSize];
373ConsoleTransportRouter transport_router(
374 tcp_transport
375#if SLMP_ENABLE_UDP_TRANSPORT
376 , udp_transport
377#endif
378 , console_link
379);
380slmp::SlmpClient plc(transport_router, tx_buffer, sizeof(tx_buffer), rx_buffer, sizeof(rx_buffer));

385bool led_ready = false;
386bool switch_raw_pressed = false;
387bool switch_stable_pressed = false;
388uint32_t switch_last_change_ms = 0;
389uint32_t switch_press_started_ms = 0;
390VerificationRecord verification = {};
391EnduranceSession endurance = {};
392ReconnectSession reconnect = {};
393uint32_t funcheck_prng_state = 0x13579BDFU;

395uint16_t txlimit_word_readback[kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount + 1U] = {};
396uint16_t txlimit_block_values[kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints + 1U] = {};

405uint32_t stream_dword_readback[kTxLimitWriteDWordsMaxCount + 1U] = {};

407bool stream_bit_readback[kTxLimitWriteBitsMaxCount + 1U] = {};
408
409void stopEndurance(bool print_summary, bool failed);
410void stopReconnect(bool print_summary);
411
412const DeviceSpec* findDeviceSpecByName(const char* token) {
413 const DeviceSpec* match = nullptr;
414 size_t match_length = 0;
415 for (size_t i = 0; i < sizeof(kDeviceSpecs) / sizeof(kDeviceSpecs[0]); ++i) {
416 const size_t name_length = strlen(kDeviceSpecs[i].name);
417 if (name_length < match_length) {
418 continue;
419 }
420 if (strncmp(token, kDeviceSpecs[i].name, name_length) == 0) {
421 match = &kDeviceSpecs[i];
422 match_length = name_length;
423 }
424 }
425 return match;
426}
427
428const DeviceSpec* findDeviceSpecByCode(slmp::DeviceCode code) {
429 for (size_t i = 0; i < sizeof(kDeviceSpecs) / sizeof(kDeviceSpecs[0]); ++i) {
430 if (kDeviceSpecs[i].code == code) {
431 return &kDeviceSpecs[i];
432 }
433 }
434 return nullptr;
435}
436
437void uppercaseInPlace(char* text) {
438 if (text == nullptr) {
439 return;
440 }
441 for (; *text != '\0'; ++text) {
442 *text = static_cast<char>(toupper(static_cast<unsigned char>(*text)));
443 }
444}
445
446bool parseUnsignedValue(const char* token, unsigned long& value, int base) {
447 if (token == nullptr || *token == '\0') {
448 return false;
449 }
450 char* end = nullptr;
451 value = strtoul(token, &end, base);
452 return end != token && *end == '\0';
453}
454
455bool parseWordValue(const char* token, uint16_t& value) {
456 unsigned long parsed = 0;
457 if (!parseUnsignedValue(token, parsed, 0) || parsed > 0xFFFFUL) {
458 return false;
459 }
460 value = static_cast<uint16_t>(parsed);
461 return true;
462}
463
464bool parseDWordValue(const char* token, uint32_t& value) {
465 unsigned long parsed = 0;
466 if (!parseUnsignedValue(token, parsed, 0)) {
467 return false;
468 }
469 value = static_cast<uint32_t>(parsed);
470 return true;
471}
472
473bool parseByteValue(const char* token, uint8_t& value) {
474 unsigned long parsed = 0;
475 if (!parseUnsignedValue(token, parsed, 0) || parsed > 0xFFUL) {
476 return false;
477 }
478 value = static_cast<uint8_t>(parsed);
479 return true;
480}
481
482bool parseUint16Value(const char* token, uint16_t& value) {
483 unsigned long parsed = 0;
484 if (!parseUnsignedValue(token, parsed, 0) || parsed > 0xFFFFUL) {
485 return false;
486 }
487 value = static_cast<uint16_t>(parsed);
488 return true;
489}
490
491bool parseListCount(const char* token, size_t max_value, uint8_t& count) {
492 unsigned long parsed = 0;
493 if (!parseUnsignedValue(token, parsed, 10) || parsed > max_value) {
494 return false;
495 }
496 count = static_cast<uint8_t>(parsed);
497 return true;
498}
499
500bool parsePointCount(const char* token, uint16_t& points) {
501 unsigned long parsed = 0;
502 if (!parseUnsignedValue(token, parsed, 10) || parsed == 0 || parsed > kMaxWordPoints) {
503 return false;
504 }
505 points = static_cast<uint16_t>(parsed);
506 return true;
507}
508
509bool parseBoolValue(char* token, bool& value) {
510 if (token == nullptr) {
511 return false;
512 }
513 uppercaseInPlace(token);
514 if (strcmp(token, "1") == 0 || strcmp(token, "ON") == 0 || strcmp(token, "TRUE") == 0) {
515 value = true;
516 return true;
517 }
518 if (strcmp(token, "0") == 0 || strcmp(token, "OFF") == 0 || strcmp(token, "FALSE") == 0) {
519 value = false;
520 return true;
521 }
522 return false;
523}
524
525void resetVerificationRecord() {
526 verification = VerificationRecord();
527}
528
529bool wordArraysEqual(const uint16_t* lhs, const uint16_t* rhs, uint16_t points) {
530 for (uint16_t i = 0; i < points; ++i) {
531 if (lhs[i] != rhs[i]) {
532 return false;
533 }
534 }
535 return true;
536}
537
538bool dwordArraysEqual(const uint32_t* lhs, const uint32_t* rhs, size_t count) {
539 for (size_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
540 if (lhs[i] != rhs[i]) {
541 return false;
542 }
543 }
544 return true;
545}
546
547bool bitArraysEqual(const bool* lhs, const bool* rhs, size_t count) {
548 for (size_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
549 if (lhs[i] != rhs[i]) {
550 return false;
551 }
552 }
553 return true;
554}
555
556const char* transportModeText(TransportMode mode) {
557 switch (mode) {
558 case TransportMode::Tcp:
559 return "tcp";
560 case TransportMode::Udp:
561 return "udp";
562 }
563 return "tcp";
564}
565
566const char* frameTypeText(slmp::FrameType frame_type) {
567 switch (frame_type) {
568 case slmp::FrameType::Frame3E:
569 return "3e";
570 case slmp::FrameType::Frame4E:
571 return "4e";
572 }
573 return "4e";
574}
575
576const char* compatibilityModeText(slmp::CompatibilityMode mode) {
577 switch (mode) {
578 case slmp::CompatibilityMode::iQR:
579 return "iqr";
580 case slmp::CompatibilityMode::Legacy:
581 return "legacy";
582 }
583 return "iqr";
584}
585
586void applyLedState();
587void pollBoardSwitch();
588void setTransportMode(TransportMode mode, bool reconnect_after_change);
589void setFrameTypeMode(slmp::FrameType frame_type);
590
591void setCompatibilityModeMode(slmp::CompatibilityMode mode) {
592 if (console_link.compatibility_mode == mode) {
593 Serial.print("compat=");
594 Serial.println(compatibilityModeText(console_link.compatibility_mode));
595 return;
596 }
597
598 console_link.compatibility_mode = mode;
599 plc.setCompatibilityMode(mode);
600 Serial.print("compat=");
601 Serial.println(compatibilityModeText(console_link.compatibility_mode));
602
603 if (plc.connected()) {
604 Serial.println("compatibility mode change will apply to the next request");
605 }
606}
607
608void printCompatibilityList() {
609 Serial.println("compatibility modes:");
610 Serial.println(" compat iqr");
611 Serial.println(" Default for iQ-R/iQ-F series (subcommands 0x0002/0x0003)");
612 Serial.println(" compat legacy");
613 Serial.println(" For Q/L series legacy SLMP (subcommands 0x0000/0x0001)");
614}
615
616void compatibilityCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
617 if (token_count == 1) {
618 Serial.print("compat=");
619 Serial.println(compatibilityModeText(console_link.compatibility_mode));
620 return;
621 }
622
623 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[1]);
624 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "LIST") == 0) {
625 printCompatibilityList();
626 return;
627 }
628 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "IQR") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "MODERN") == 0) {
629 setCompatibilityModeMode(slmp::CompatibilityMode::iQR);
630 return;
631 }
632 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "LEGACY") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "Q") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "L") == 0) {
633 setCompatibilityModeMode(slmp::CompatibilityMode::Legacy);
634 return;
635 }
636
637 Serial.println("compat usage: compat [iqr|legacy|list]");
638}
639
640uint16_t readFrameLe16(const uint8_t* bytes) {
641 if (bytes == nullptr) {
642 return 0;
643 }
644 return static_cast<uint16_t>(bytes[0]) | (static_cast<uint16_t>(bytes[1]) << 8U);
645}
646
647void copyText(char* out, size_t out_capacity, const char* text) {
648 if (out == nullptr || out_capacity == 0) {
649 return;
650 }
651 size_t index = 0;
652 if (text != nullptr) {
653 for (; index + 1 < out_capacity && text[index] != '\0'; ++index) {
654 out[index] = text[index];
655 }
656 }
657 out[index] = '\0';
658}
659
660uint32_t nextFuncheckRandom() {
661 if (funcheck_prng_state == 0U) {
662 funcheck_prng_state = static_cast<uint32_t>(micros()) ^ 0xA341316CU;
663 }
664 funcheck_prng_state ^= funcheck_prng_state << 13U;
665 funcheck_prng_state ^= funcheck_prng_state >> 17U;
666 funcheck_prng_state ^= funcheck_prng_state << 5U;
667 return funcheck_prng_state;
668}
669
670uint16_t nextFuncheckWordValue() {
671 const uint16_t value = static_cast<uint16_t>((nextFuncheckRandom() % 60000U) + 1U);
672 return value == 0U ? 1U : value;
673}
674
675uint32_t nextFuncheckDWordValue() {
676 const uint32_t value = (nextFuncheckRandom() & 0x7FFFFFFFU) + 1U;
677 return value == 0U ? 1U : value;
678}
679
680void printFuncheckWordValues(const char* label, const uint16_t* values, size_t count) {
681 Serial.print(label);
682 for (size_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
683 if (i != 0) {
684 Serial.print(", ");
685 }
686 Serial.print(values[i]);
687 }
688 Serial.println();
689}
690
691void printFuncheckDWordValues(const char* label, const uint32_t* values, size_t count) {
692 Serial.print(label);
693 for (size_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
694 if (i != 0) {
695 Serial.print(", ");
696 }
697 Serial.print(static_cast<unsigned long>(values[i]));
698 }
699 Serial.println();
700}
701
702void joinTokens(char* tokens[], int start_index, int token_count, char* out, size_t out_capacity) {
703 if (out == nullptr || out_capacity == 0) {
704 return;
705 }
706
707 out[0] = '\0';
708 size_t used = 0;
709 for (int i = start_index; i < token_count; ++i) {
710 const char* token = tokens[i];
711 if (token == nullptr || *token == '\0') {
712 continue;
713 }
714
715 if (used != 0) {
716 if (used + 1 >= out_capacity) {
717 break;
718 }
719 out[used++] = ' ';
720 out[used] = '\0';
721 }
722
723 const size_t available = out_capacity - used - 1;
724 const size_t token_length = strlen(token);
725 const size_t copy_length = token_length < available ? token_length : available;
726 memcpy(out + used, token, copy_length);
727 used += copy_length;
728 out[used] = '\0';
729
730 if (copy_length < token_length) {
731 break;
732 }
733 }
734}
735
736bool parseDeviceAddress(char* token, slmp::DeviceAddress& device) {
737 if (token == nullptr || *token == '\0') {
738 return false;
739 }
740
741 uppercaseInPlace(token);
742 const DeviceSpec* spec = findDeviceSpecByName(token);
743 if (spec == nullptr) {
744 return false;
745 }
746
747 const size_t prefix_length = strlen(spec->name);
748 const char* number_text = token + prefix_length;
749 unsigned long number = 0;
750 if (!parseUnsignedValue(number_text, number, spec->hex_address ? 16 : 10)) {
751 return false;
752 }
753
754 device.code = spec->code;
755 device.number = static_cast<uint32_t>(number);
756 return true;
757}
758
759void printDeviceAddress(const slmp::DeviceAddress& device, uint32_t offset = 0) {
760 const DeviceSpec* spec = findDeviceSpecByCode(device.code);
761 if (spec == nullptr) {
762 Serial.print("?");
763 Serial.print(device.number + offset);
764 return;
765 }
766
767 Serial.print(spec->name);
768 if (spec->hex_address) {
769 Serial.print(device.number + offset, HEX);
770 } else {
771 Serial.print(device.number + offset);
772 }
773}
774
775void printTargetAddress() {
776 const slmp::TargetAddress& target = plc.target();
777 Serial.print("target_network=");
778 Serial.println(target.network);
779 Serial.print("target_station=");
780 Serial.println(target.station);
781 Serial.print("target_module_io=0x");
782 Serial.println(target.module_io, HEX);
783 Serial.print("target_multidrop=");
784 Serial.println(target.multidrop);
785}
786
787void pulseEthernetReset() {
788 pinMode(kEthernetResetPin, OUTPUT);
789 digitalWrite(kEthernetResetPin, LOW);
790 delay(100);
791 digitalWrite(kEthernetResetPin, HIGH);
792 delay(100);
793}
794
795void printLastFrames() {
796 char request_hex[256] = {};
797 char response_hex[256] = {};
798
799 if (plc.lastRequestFrameLength() == 0) {
800 Serial.println("last request: <none>");
801 } else {
802 slmp::formatHexBytes(
803 plc.lastRequestFrame(),
804 plc.lastRequestFrameLength(),
805 request_hex,
806 sizeof(request_hex)
807 );
808 Serial.print("last request: ");
809 Serial.println(request_hex);
810 }
811
812 if (plc.lastResponseFrameLength() == 0) {
813 Serial.println("last response: <none>");
814 } else {
815 slmp::formatHexBytes(
816 plc.lastResponseFrame(),
817 plc.lastResponseFrameLength(),
818 response_hex,
819 sizeof(response_hex)
820 );
821 Serial.print("last response: ");
822 Serial.println(response_hex);
823 }
824}
825
826void printLastPlcError(const char* label) {
827 Serial.print(label);
828 Serial.print(" failed: ");
829 Serial.print(slmp::errorString(plc.lastError()));
830 Serial.print(" end=0x");
831 Serial.print(plc.lastEndCode(), HEX);
832 Serial.print(" (");
833 Serial.print(slmp::endCodeString(plc.lastEndCode()));
834 Serial.println(")");
835 printLastFrames();
836}
837
838void printEvidenceHeader() {
839 Serial.println("--- Evidence Header ---");
840 Serial.println("board=W6300-EVB-Pico2 (RP2350)");
841 Serial.print("local_ip=");
842 Serial.println(Ethernet.localIP());
843 Serial.print("plc_host=");
844 Serial.println(kPlcHost);
845 Serial.print("plc_port=");
846 Serial.println(console_link.plc_port);
847 Serial.print("transport=");
848 Serial.println(transportModeText(console_link.transport_mode));
849 Serial.print("frame=");
850 Serial.println(frameTypeText(console_link.frame_type));
851 Serial.print("compat=");
852 Serial.println(compatibilityModeText(console_link.compatibility_mode));
853
854 if (plc.connected()) {
855 slmp::TypeNameInfo type_name = {};
856 if (plc.readTypeName(type_name) == slmp::Error::Ok) {
857 Serial.print("plc_model=");
858 Serial.println(type_name.model);
859 } else {
860 Serial.println("plc_model=unknown (read error)");
861 }
862 } else {
863 Serial.println("plc_model=disconnected");
864 }
865 Serial.println("-----------------------");
866}
867
868void printPrompt() {
869 Serial.print("> ");
870}
871
872bool bringUpEthernet() {
873 pulseEthernetReset();
874 Ethernet.config(kLocalIp, kGateway, kSubnet, kDns);
875
876 if (!Ethernet.begin()) {
877 ethernet_ready = false;
878 Serial.println("ethernet begin failed");
879 return false;
880 }
881
882 const IPAddress local_ip = Ethernet.localIP();
883 ethernet_ready = local_ip == kLocalIp;
884
885 Serial.println("network_mode=static");
886 Serial.print("local ip=");
887 Serial.println(local_ip);
888 Serial.print("gateway=");
889 Serial.println(Ethernet.gatewayIP());
890 Serial.print("subnet=");
891 Serial.println(Ethernet.subnetMask());
892 Serial.print("dns=");
893 Serial.println(Ethernet.dnsIP());
894 Serial.print("ethernet_connected=");
895 Serial.println(Ethernet.connected() ? "yes" : "no");
896 if (!ethernet_ready) {
897 Serial.println("static IP apply failed");
898 }
899 return ethernet_ready;
900}
901
902bool ensureEthernet() {
903 if (ethernet_ready) {
904 return true;
905 }
906 return bringUpEthernet();
907}
908
909struct AutoProfileCandidate {
910 slmp::FrameType frame_type;
911 slmp::CompatibilityMode compatibility_mode;
912};
913
914bool probeCurrentProfileReachable() {
915 uint16_t probe_value = 0;
916 const slmp::Error error = plc.readOneWord({slmp::DeviceCode::D, 0}, probe_value);
917 return error == slmp::Error::Ok || error == slmp::Error::PlcError;
918}
919
920bool autoDetectProfile(bool verbose, slmp::TypeNameInfo* out_type_name, bool* out_type_name_ok) {
921 if (out_type_name != nullptr) {
922 *out_type_name = slmp::TypeNameInfo();
923 }
924 if (out_type_name_ok != nullptr) {
925 *out_type_name_ok = false;
926 }
927
928 const AutoProfileCandidate current = {console_link.frame_type, console_link.compatibility_mode};
929 const AutoProfileCandidate fallback_candidates[] = {
930 {slmp::FrameType::Frame4E, slmp::CompatibilityMode::iQR},
931 {slmp::FrameType::Frame3E, slmp::CompatibilityMode::Legacy},
932 {slmp::FrameType::Frame3E, slmp::CompatibilityMode::iQR},
933 {slmp::FrameType::Frame4E, slmp::CompatibilityMode::Legacy},
934 };
935
936 AutoProfileCandidate probe_order[1 + (sizeof(fallback_candidates) / sizeof(fallback_candidates[0]))] = {};
937 size_t probe_count = 0;
938 probe_order[probe_count++] = current;
939 for (size_t i = 0; i < sizeof(fallback_candidates) / sizeof(fallback_candidates[0]); ++i) {
940 if (fallback_candidates[i].frame_type == current.frame_type &&
941 fallback_candidates[i].compatibility_mode == current.compatibility_mode) {
942 continue;
943 }
944 probe_order[probe_count++] = fallback_candidates[i];
945 }
946
947 bool resolved = false;
948 AutoProfileCandidate selected = current;
949 for (size_t i = 0; i < probe_count; ++i) {
950 const AutoProfileCandidate candidate = probe_order[i];
951 plc.setFrameType(candidate.frame_type);
952 plc.setCompatibilityMode(candidate.compatibility_mode);
953 if (probeCurrentProfileReachable()) {
954 selected = candidate;
955 resolved = true;
956 break;
957 }
958 }
959
960 plc.setFrameType(selected.frame_type);
961 plc.setCompatibilityMode(selected.compatibility_mode);
962 console_link.frame_type = selected.frame_type;
963 console_link.compatibility_mode = selected.compatibility_mode;
964
965 if (resolved && out_type_name != nullptr) {
966 *out_type_name_ok = plc.readTypeName(*out_type_name) == slmp::Error::Ok;
967 }
968
969 if (verbose) {
970 if (resolved) {
971 Serial.print("auto_profile frame=");
972 Serial.print(frameTypeText(console_link.frame_type));
973 Serial.print(" compat=");
974 Serial.println(compatibilityModeText(console_link.compatibility_mode));
975 } else {
976 Serial.println("auto_profile unresolved (keeping current profile)");
977 }
978 }
979 return resolved;
980}
981
982bool connectPlc(bool verbose) {
983 if (!ensureEthernet()) {
984 return false;
985 }
986 if (plc.connected()) {
987 if (verbose) {
988 Serial.println("plc already connected");
989 }
990 return true;
991 }
992 if (!plc.connect(kPlcHost, console_link.plc_port)) {
993 if (verbose) {
994 Serial.print("connect failed: ");
995 Serial.println(slmp::errorString(plc.lastError()));
996 }
997 return false;
998 }
999
1000 slmp::TypeNameInfo type_name = {};
1001 bool type_name_ok = false;
1002 (void)autoDetectProfile(verbose, &type_name, &type_name_ok);
1003
1004 if (verbose) {
1005 Serial.print("transport=");
1006 Serial.print(transportModeText(console_link.transport_mode));
1007 Serial.print(" frame=");
1008 Serial.print(frameTypeText(console_link.frame_type));
1009 Serial.print(" compat=");
1010 Serial.println(compatibilityModeText(console_link.compatibility_mode));
1011 if (type_name_ok) {
1012 Serial.print("model=");
1013 Serial.print(type_name.model);
1014 if (type_name.has_model_code) {
1015 Serial.print(" code=0x");
1016 Serial.print(type_name.model_code, HEX);
1017 }
1018 Serial.println();
1019 const slmp::ProfileRecommendation recommendation = slmp::recommendProfile(type_name);
1020 Serial.print("profile_class=");
1021 Serial.print(slmp::profileClassString(recommendation.profile_class));
1022 Serial.print(" confident=");
1023 Serial.println(recommendation.confident ? "yes" : "no");
1024 } else {
1025 Serial.println("model=unknown (readTypeName unavailable)");
1026 }
1027 Serial.println("plc connected");
1028 }
1029 return true;
1030}
1031
1032void setTransportMode(TransportMode mode, bool reconnect_after_change) {
1033 if (console_link.transport_mode == mode) {
1034 Serial.print("transport=");
1035 Serial.println(transportModeText(console_link.transport_mode));
1036 return;
1037 }
1038
1039 const bool was_connected = plc.connected();
1040 if (was_connected) {
1041 plc.close();
1042 }
1043
1044 console_link.transport_mode = mode;
1045 Serial.print("transport=");
1046 Serial.println(transportModeText(console_link.transport_mode));
1047
1048 if (reconnect_after_change && was_connected) {
1049 (void)connectPlc(true);
1050 }
1051}
1052
1053void setFrameTypeMode(slmp::FrameType frame_type) {
1054 if (console_link.frame_type == frame_type) {
1055 Serial.print("frame=");
1056 Serial.println(frameTypeText(console_link.frame_type));
1057 return;
1058 }
1059
1060 console_link.frame_type = frame_type;
1061 plc.setFrameType(frame_type);
1062 Serial.print("frame=");
1063 Serial.println(frameTypeText(console_link.frame_type));
1064
1065 if (plc.connected()) {
1066 Serial.println("frame change will apply to the next request");
1067 }
1068}
1069
1070void closePlc() {
1071 plc.close();
1072 Serial.println("plc closed");
1073}
1074
1075void reinitializeEthernet() {
1076 plc.close();
1077 ethernet_ready = false;
1078 (void)bringUpEthernet();
1079}
1080
1081void applyLedState() {
1082#ifdef LED_BUILTIN
1083 if (!led_ready) {
1084 return;
1085 }
1086
1087 const bool connected = plc.connected();
1088 bool led_on = false;
1089 if (!connected) {
1090 led_on = false;
1091 } else if (console_link.transport_mode == TransportMode::Udp) {
1092 led_on = ((millis() / 250U) % 2U) != 0U;
1093 } else {
1094 led_on = true;
1095 }
1096
1097 if (plc.isBusy()) {
1098 led_on = ((millis() / 100U) % 2U) != 0U;
1099 }
1100
1101 digitalWrite(LED_BUILTIN, led_on ? HIGH : LOW);
1102#endif
1103}
1104
1105bool boardSwitchPressed() {
1106 return static_cast<bool>(BOOTSEL);
1107}
1108
1109void handleBoardSwitchShortPress() {
1110 if (plc.connected()) {
1111 closePlc();
1112 } else {
1113 (void)connectPlc(true);
1114 }
1115}
1116
1117void handleBoardSwitchLongPress() {
1118 if (console_link.transport_mode == TransportMode::Tcp) {
1119 setTransportMode(TransportMode::Udp, true);
1120 } else {
1121 setTransportMode(TransportMode::Tcp, true);
1122 }
1123}
1124
1125void handleBoardSwitchVeryLongPress() {
1126 if (console_link.frame_type == slmp::FrameType::Frame4E) {
1127 setFrameTypeMode(slmp::FrameType::Frame3E);
1128 } else {
1129 setFrameTypeMode(slmp::FrameType::Frame4E);
1130 }
1131}
1132
1133void pollBoardSwitch() {
1134 const bool raw_pressed = boardSwitchPressed();
1135 if (raw_pressed != switch_raw_pressed) {
1136 switch_raw_pressed = raw_pressed;
1137 switch_last_change_ms = millis();
1138 }
1139
1140 if (millis() - switch_last_change_ms < kSwitchDebounceMs) {
1141 return;
1142 }
1143
1144 if (switch_stable_pressed == switch_raw_pressed) {
1145 return;
1146 }
1147
1148 switch_stable_pressed = switch_raw_pressed;
1149 if (switch_stable_pressed) {
1150 switch_press_started_ms = millis();
1151 return;
1152 }
1153
1154 const uint32_t held_ms = millis() - switch_press_started_ms;
1155 if (held_ms < kSwitchShortPressMs) {
1156 handleBoardSwitchShortPress();
1157 } else if (held_ms < kSwitchLongPressMs) {
1158 handleBoardSwitchLongPress();
1159 } else if (held_ms < kSwitchLongPressMs * 2U) {
1160 handleBoardSwitchVeryLongPress();
1161 }
1162 switch_press_started_ms = 0;
1163}
1164
1165void printStatus() {
1166 Serial.print("local ip=");
1167 Serial.println(Ethernet.localIP());
1168 Serial.print("gateway=");
1169 Serial.println(Ethernet.gatewayIP());
1170 Serial.print("subnet=");
1171 Serial.println(Ethernet.subnetMask());
1172 Serial.print("dns=");
1173 Serial.println(Ethernet.dnsIP());
1174 Serial.print("ethernet_connected=");
1175 Serial.println(Ethernet.connected() ? "yes" : "no");
1176 Serial.print("transport=");
1177 Serial.println(transportModeText(console_link.transport_mode));
1178 Serial.print("frame=");
1179 Serial.println(frameTypeText(console_link.frame_type));
1180 Serial.print("compat=");
1181 Serial.println(compatibilityModeText(console_link.compatibility_mode));
1182 Serial.print("plc_port=");
1183 Serial.println(console_link.plc_port);
1184 Serial.print("plc_connected=");
1185 Serial.println(plc.connected() ? "yes" : "no");
1186 Serial.print("tx_buffer_bytes=");
1187 Serial.println(sizeof(tx_buffer));
1188 Serial.print("rx_buffer_bytes=");
1189 Serial.println(sizeof(rx_buffer));
1190 Serial.print("timeout_ms=");
1191 Serial.println(plc.timeoutMs());
1192 Serial.print("monitoring_timer=");
1193 Serial.println(plc.monitoringTimer());
1194 printTargetAddress();
1195 Serial.print("last_error=");
1196 Serial.println(slmp::errorString(plc.lastError()));
1197 Serial.print("last_end_code=0x");
1198 Serial.print(plc.lastEndCode(), HEX);
1199 Serial.print(" (");
1200 Serial.print(slmp::endCodeString(plc.lastEndCode()));
1201 Serial.println(")");
1202 Serial.print("verification_active=");
1203 Serial.println(verification.active ? "yes" : "no");
1204 if (verification.active) {
1205 Serial.print("verification_judged=");
1206 Serial.println(verification.judged ? "yes" : "no");
1207 if (verification.judged) {
1208 Serial.print("verification_result=");
1209 Serial.println(verification.pass ? "ok" : "ng");
1210 }
1211 }
1212 Serial.print("endurance_active=");
1213 Serial.println(endurance.active ? "yes" : "no");
1214 Serial.print("reconnect_active=");
1215 Serial.println(reconnect.active ? "yes" : "no");
1216}
1217
1218void printVerificationSummary() {
1219 if (!verification.active) {
1220 Serial.println("verification: none");
1221 return;
1222 }
1223
1224 Serial.print("verification kind=");
1225 Serial.println(verification.kind == VerificationKind::WordWrite ? "word_write" : "bit_write");
1226 Serial.print("device=");
1227 printDeviceAddress(verification.device);
1228 Serial.println();
1229
1230 if (verification.kind == VerificationKind::WordWrite) {
1231 for (uint16_t i = 0; i < verification.points; ++i) {
1232 printDeviceAddress(verification.device, i);
1233 Serial.print(" before=");
1234 Serial.print(verification.before_words[i]);
1235 Serial.print(" written=");
1236 Serial.print(verification.written_words[i]);
1237 Serial.print(" readback=");
1238 Serial.println(verification.readback_words[i]);
1239 }
1240 } else if (verification.kind == VerificationKind::BitWrite) {
1241 printDeviceAddress(verification.device);
1242 Serial.print(" before=");
1243 Serial.print(verification.before_bit ? 1 : 0);
1244 Serial.print(" written=");
1245 Serial.print(verification.written_bit ? 1 : 0);
1246 Serial.print(" readback=");
1247 Serial.println(verification.readback_bit ? 1 : 0);
1248 }
1249
1250 Serial.print("auto_readback_match=");
1251 Serial.println(verification.readback_match ? "yes" : "no");
1252
1253 if (!verification.judged) {
1254 Serial.println("manual_judgement=pending");
1255 Serial.println("observe machine/hmi and enter: judge ok [note] or judge ng [note]");
1256 return;
1257 }
1258
1259 Serial.print("manual_judgement=");
1260 Serial.println(verification.pass ? "ok" : "ng");
1261 if (verification.note[0] != '\0') {
1262 Serial.print("note=");
1263 Serial.println(verification.note);
1264 }
1265}
1266
1267void recordFuncheckResult(FuncheckSummary& summary, FuncheckResult result) {
1268 if (result == FuncheckResult::Ok) {
1269 ++summary.ok;
1270 return;
1271 }
1272 ++summary.fail;
1273}
1274
1275const char* funcheckResultText(FuncheckResult result) {
1276 return result == FuncheckResult::Ok ? "ok" : "fail";
1277}
1278
1279void clearWordsSilently(const slmp::DeviceAddress& device, size_t count) {
1280 if (count == 0 || count > kMaxWordPoints || !connectPlc(false)) {
1281 return;
1282 }
1283 uint16_t zeros[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
1284 (void)plc.writeWords(device, zeros, count);
1285}
1286
1287void clearWordRangeSilently(const slmp::DeviceAddress& device, size_t count) {
1288 if (count == 0 || !connectPlc(false)) {
1289 return;
1290 }
1291 uint16_t zeros[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
1292 size_t offset = 0;
1293 while (offset < count) {
1294 const size_t chunk = (count - offset) > kMaxWordPoints ? kMaxWordPoints : (count - offset);
1295 const slmp::DeviceAddress chunk_device = {device.code, device.number + static_cast<uint32_t>(offset)};
1296 (void)plc.writeWords(chunk_device, zeros, chunk);
1297 offset += chunk;
1298 }
1299}
1300
1301void clearBitsSilently(const slmp::DeviceAddress& device, size_t count) {
1302 if (count == 0 || count > kMaxWordPoints || !connectPlc(false)) {
1303 return;
1304 }
1305 if (count == 1) {
1306 (void)plc.writeOneBit(device, false);
1307 return;
1308 }
1309 bool zeros[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
1310 (void)plc.writeBits(device, zeros, count);
1311}
1312
1313void clearDWordsSilently(const slmp::DeviceAddress& device, size_t count) {
1314 if (count == 0 || count > kMaxWordPoints || !connectPlc(false)) {
1315 return;
1316 }
1317 if (count == 1) {
1318 (void)plc.writeOneDWord(device, 0U);
1319 return;
1320 }
1321 uint32_t zeros[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
1322 (void)plc.writeDWords(device, zeros, count);
1323}
1324
1325void clearRandomWordsSilently(
1326 const slmp::DeviceAddress* word_devices,
1327 size_t word_count,
1328 const slmp::DeviceAddress* dword_devices,
1329 size_t dword_count
1330) {
1331 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
1332 return;
1333 }
1334 uint16_t zero_words[kMaxRandomWordDevices] = {};
1335 uint32_t zero_dwords[kMaxRandomDWordDevices] = {};
1336 (void)plc.writeRandomWords(word_devices, zero_words, word_count, dword_devices, zero_dwords, dword_count);
1337}
1338
1339void clearRandomBitsSilently(const slmp::DeviceAddress* bit_devices, size_t bit_count) {
1340 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
1341 return;
1342 }
1343 bool zero_bits[kMaxRandomBitDevices] = {};
1344 (void)plc.writeRandomBits(bit_devices, zero_bits, bit_count);
1345}
1346
1347void clearPackedBitWordsSilently(const slmp::DeviceAddress& device, uint16_t packed_word_count) {
1348 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
1349 return;
1350 }
1351 uint16_t zero_words[kMaxBlockPoints] = {};
1352 if (packed_word_count <= kMaxBlockPoints) {
1353 const slmp::DeviceBlockWrite bit_block = {device, zero_words, packed_word_count};
1354 if (plc.writeBlock(nullptr, 0, &bit_block, 1) == slmp::Error::Ok) {
1355 return;
1356 }
1357 }
1358 const uint32_t bit_count = static_cast<uint32_t>(packed_word_count) * 16U;
1359 for (uint32_t offset = 0; offset < bit_count; ++offset) {
1360 const slmp::DeviceAddress bit_device = {device.code, device.number + offset};
1361 (void)plc.writeOneBit(bit_device, false);
1362 }
1363}
1364
1365void clearBlockSilently(
1366 const slmp::DeviceAddress& word_device,
1367 uint16_t word_points,
1368 const slmp::DeviceAddress& bit_device,
1369 uint16_t bit_points
1370) {
1371 if (word_points > 0) {
1372 clearWordRangeSilently(word_device, word_points);
1373 }
1374 if (bit_points > 0) {
1375 clearPackedBitWordsSilently(bit_device, bit_points);
1376 }
1377}
1378
1379void clearVerificationTargetSilently() {
1380 if (!verification.active) {
1381 return;
1382 }
1383 if (verification.kind == VerificationKind::WordWrite) {
1384 clearWordsSilently(verification.device, verification.points);
1385 return;
1386 }
1387 clearBitsSilently(verification.device, 1);
1388}
1389
1390void printFuncheckApiDevices(const char* label, const slmp::DeviceAddress* devices, size_t count) {
1391 Serial.print(label);
1392 for (size_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
1393 if (i != 0) {
1394 Serial.print(", ");
1395 }
1396 printDeviceAddress(devices[i]);
1397 }
1398 Serial.println();
1399}
1400
1401void resetEnduranceSession() {
1402 endurance = EnduranceSession();
1403}
1404
1405void resetReconnectSession() {
1406 reconnect = ReconnectSession();
1407}
1408
1409bool parseBenchModeToken(char* token, BenchMode& mode) {
1410 if (token == nullptr) {
1411 return false;
1412 }
1413 uppercaseInPlace(token);
1414 if (strcmp(token, "ROW") == 0 || strcmp(token, "READ") == 0) {
1415 mode = BenchMode::Row;
1416 return true;
1417 }
1418 if (strcmp(token, "WOW") == 0 || strcmp(token, "WRITE") == 0) {
1419 mode = BenchMode::Wow;
1420 return true;
1421 }
1422 if (strcmp(token, "PAIR") == 0) {
1423 mode = BenchMode::Pair;
1424 return true;
1425 }
1426 if (strcmp(token, "RW") == 0) {
1427 mode = BenchMode::Rw;
1428 return true;
1429 }
1430 if (strcmp(token, "WW") == 0) {
1431 mode = BenchMode::Ww;
1432 return true;
1433 }
1434 if (strcmp(token, "BLOCK") == 0) {
1435 mode = BenchMode::Block;
1436 return true;
1437 }
1438 return false;
1439}
1440
1441const char* benchModeText(BenchMode mode) {
1442 switch (mode) {
1443 case BenchMode::Row:
1444 return "row";
1445 case BenchMode::Wow:
1446 return "wow";
1447 case BenchMode::Pair:
1448 return "pair";
1449 case BenchMode::Rw:
1450 return "rw";
1451 case BenchMode::Ww:
1452 return "ww";
1453 case BenchMode::Block:
1454 return "block";
1455 default:
1456 return "none";
1457 }
1458}
1459
1460void fillBenchWords(uint16_t* values, size_t count, uint16_t seed) {
1461 for (size_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
1462 values[i] = static_cast<uint16_t>(seed + i);
1463 }
1464}
1465
1466void clearBenchWords(const slmp::DeviceAddress& device, size_t count) {
1467 if (count == 0 || !connectPlc(false)) {
1468 return;
1469 }
1470 uint16_t zeros[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
1471 size_t offset = 0;
1472 while (offset < count) {
1473 const size_t chunk = (count - offset) > kMaxWordPoints ? kMaxWordPoints : (count - offset);
1474 const slmp::DeviceAddress chunk_device = {device.code, device.number + static_cast<uint32_t>(offset)};
1475 (void)plc.writeWords(chunk_device, zeros, chunk);
1476 offset += chunk;
1477 }
1478}
1479
1480void clearBenchTargets() {
1481 clearBenchWords(kBenchOneWordDevice, 1);
1482 clearBenchWords(kBenchWordArrayDevice, kBenchWordPoints);
1483 clearBenchWords(kBenchBlockWordDevice, kBenchBlockPoints);
1484}
1485
1486void printBenchList() {
1487 Serial.println("bench modes:");
1488 Serial.println(" bench");
1489 Serial.println(" runs pair benchmark with default cycles");
1490 Serial.println(" bench row [cycles]");
1491 Serial.println(" bench wow [cycles]");
1492 Serial.println(" bench pair [cycles]");
1493 Serial.println(" bench rw [cycles]");
1494 Serial.println(" bench ww [cycles]");
1495 Serial.println(" bench block [cycles]");
1496 Serial.println("bench devices:");
1497 Serial.print(" row/wow/pair: ");
1498 printDeviceAddress(kBenchOneWordDevice, 0);
1499 Serial.println();
1500 Serial.print(" rw/ww: ");
1501 printDeviceAddress(kBenchWordArrayDevice, 0);
1502 Serial.print("..");
1503 printDeviceAddress(kBenchWordArrayDevice, static_cast<uint32_t>(kBenchWordPoints - 1U));
1504 Serial.println();
1505 Serial.print(" block: ");
1506 printDeviceAddress(kBenchBlockWordDevice, 0);
1507 Serial.print("..");
1508 printDeviceAddress(kBenchBlockWordDevice, static_cast<uint32_t>(kBenchBlockPoints - 1U));
1509 Serial.println();
1510}
1511
1512void printBenchProgress(const char* label, BenchMode mode, const BenchSummary& summary, uint32_t started_ms) {
1513 Serial.print(label);
1514 Serial.print(" mode=");
1515 Serial.print(benchModeText(mode));
1516 Serial.print(" cycles=");
1517 Serial.print(summary.cycles);
1518 Serial.print(" requests=");
1519 Serial.print(summary.requests);
1520 Serial.print(" fail=");
1521 Serial.print(summary.fail);
1522 Serial.print(" elapsed_ms=");
1523 const uint32_t elapsed_ms = millis() - started_ms;
1524 Serial.print(elapsed_ms);
1525 Serial.print(" last_cycle_ms=");
1526 Serial.print(summary.last_cycle_ms);
1527 Serial.print(" avg_cycle_ms=");
1528 if (summary.cycles == 0) {
1529 Serial.print(0);
1530 } else {
1531 Serial.print(static_cast<uint32_t>(summary.total_cycle_ms / summary.cycles));
1532 }
1533 Serial.print(" avg_req_ms=");
1534 if (summary.requests == 0) {
1535 Serial.print(0);
1536 } else {
1537 Serial.print(static_cast<uint32_t>(summary.total_cycle_ms / summary.requests));
1538 }
1539 Serial.print(" min_ms=");
1540 Serial.print(summary.cycles == 0 ? 0U : summary.min_cycle_ms);
1541 Serial.print(" max_ms=");
1542 Serial.print(summary.max_cycle_ms);
1543 Serial.print(" req_per_sec=");
1544 if (elapsed_ms == 0 || summary.requests == 0) {
1545 Serial.print(0);
1546 } else {
1547 Serial.print(static_cast<uint32_t>((static_cast<uint64_t>(summary.requests) * 1000U) / elapsed_ms));
1548 }
1549 Serial.print(" last_req_bytes=");
1550 Serial.print(summary.last_request_bytes);
1551 Serial.print(" last_resp_bytes=");
1552 Serial.println(summary.last_response_bytes);
1553}
1554
1555bool runBench(BenchMode mode, uint32_t cycle_limit) {
1556 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
1557 Serial.println("bench failed: plc not connected");
1558 return false;
1559 }
1560
1561 clearBenchTargets();
1562 BenchSummary summary = {};
1563 const uint32_t started_ms = millis();
1564 uint32_t last_report_ms = started_ms;
1565 uint16_t seed = 1000;
1566
1567 for (uint32_t cycle = 0; cycle < cycle_limit; ++cycle) {
1568 const uint32_t cycle_started_ms = millis();
1569 bool ok = false;
1570 size_t request_count = 0;
1571
1572 if (mode == BenchMode::Row) {
1573 uint16_t value = 0;
1574 ok = plc.readOneWord(kBenchOneWordDevice, value) == slmp::Error::Ok;
1575 request_count = 1;
1576 } else if (mode == BenchMode::Wow) {
1577 ok = plc.writeOneWord(kBenchOneWordDevice, seed++) == slmp::Error::Ok;
1578 request_count = 1;
1579 } else if (mode == BenchMode::Pair) {
1580 const uint16_t expected = seed++;
1581 uint16_t readback = 0;
1582 ok = plc.writeOneWord(kBenchOneWordDevice, expected) == slmp::Error::Ok &&
1583 plc.readOneWord(kBenchOneWordDevice, readback) == slmp::Error::Ok &&
1584 readback == expected;
1585 request_count = 2;
1586 } else if (mode == BenchMode::Rw) {
1587 ok = plc.readWords(
1588 kBenchWordArrayDevice,
1589 static_cast<uint16_t>(kBenchWordPoints),
1590 bench_word_readback,
1591 kBenchWordPoints) == slmp::Error::Ok;
1592 request_count = 1;
1593 } else if (mode == BenchMode::Ww) {
1594 fillBenchWords(bench_word_values, kBenchWordPoints, seed);
1595 seed = static_cast<uint16_t>(seed + kBenchWordPoints);
1596 ok = plc.writeWords(kBenchWordArrayDevice, bench_word_values, kBenchWordPoints) == slmp::Error::Ok;
1597 request_count = 1;
1598 } else if (mode == BenchMode::Block) {
1599 fillBenchWords(bench_block_values, kBenchBlockPoints, seed);
1600 seed = static_cast<uint16_t>(seed + kBenchBlockPoints);
1601 const slmp::DeviceBlockWrite block = {kBenchBlockWordDevice, bench_block_values, static_cast<uint16_t>(kBenchBlockPoints)};
1602 const slmp::DeviceBlockRead read_block = {kBenchBlockWordDevice, static_cast<uint16_t>(kBenchBlockPoints)};
1603 ok = plc.writeBlock(&block, 1, nullptr, 0) == slmp::Error::Ok &&
1604 plc.readBlock(&read_block, 1, nullptr, 0, bench_block_readback, kBenchBlockPoints, nullptr, 0) == slmp::Error::Ok &&
1605 wordArraysEqual(bench_block_values, bench_block_readback, static_cast<uint16_t>(kBenchBlockPoints));
1606 request_count = 2;
1607 }
1608
1609 summary.last_cycle_ms = millis() - cycle_started_ms;
1610 summary.last_request_bytes = plc.lastRequestFrameLength();
1611 summary.last_response_bytes = plc.lastResponseFrameLength();
1612 if (summary.cycles == 0 || summary.last_cycle_ms < summary.min_cycle_ms) {
1613 summary.min_cycle_ms = summary.last_cycle_ms;
1614 }
1615 if (summary.last_cycle_ms > summary.max_cycle_ms) {
1616 summary.max_cycle_ms = summary.last_cycle_ms;
1617 }
1618 summary.total_cycle_ms += summary.last_cycle_ms;
1619 ++summary.cycles;
1620 summary.requests += static_cast<uint32_t>(request_count);
1621
1622 if (!ok) {
1623 ++summary.fail;
1624 Serial.print("bench failed: mode=");
1625 Serial.print(benchModeText(mode));
1626 Serial.print(" cycle=");
1627 Serial.println(cycle + 1U);
1628 printLastPlcError("bench");
1629 printBenchProgress("bench summary:", mode, summary, started_ms);
1630 clearBenchTargets();
1631 return false;
1632 }
1633
1634 if (millis() - last_report_ms >= kBenchReportIntervalMs) {
1635 printBenchProgress("bench progress:", mode, summary, started_ms);
1636 last_report_ms = millis();
1637 }
1638 }
1639
1640 printBenchProgress("bench summary:", mode, summary, started_ms);
1641 clearBenchTargets();
1642 return true;
1643}
1644
1645void benchCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
1646 if (token_count >= 2) {
1647 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[1]);
1648 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "LIST") == 0) {
1649 printBenchList();
1650 return;
1651 }
1652 }
1653
1654 BenchMode mode = BenchMode::Pair;
1655 uint32_t cycles = kBenchDefaultCycles;
1656 if (token_count >= 2 && !parseBenchModeToken(tokens[1], mode)) {
1657 Serial.println("bench usage: bench [row|wow|pair|rw|ww|block] [cycles]");
1658 return;
1659 }
1660 if (token_count >= 3) {
1661 unsigned long parsed_cycles = 0;
1662 if (!parseUnsignedValue(tokens[2], parsed_cycles, 10) || parsed_cycles == 0) {
1663 Serial.println("bench usage: bench [row|wow|pair|rw|ww|block] [cycles]");
1664 return;
1665 }
1666 cycles = static_cast<uint32_t>(parsed_cycles);
1667 }
1668
1669 Serial.print("bench start mode=");
1670 Serial.print(benchModeText(mode));
1671 Serial.print(" cycles=");
1672 Serial.println(cycles);
1673 printEvidenceHeader();
1674 (void)runBench(mode, cycles);
1675}
1676
1677void printFuncheckList() {
1678 Serial.println("funcheck modes:");
1679 Serial.println(" funcheck");
1680 Serial.println(" runs direct + api suites");
1681 Serial.println(" funcheck direct");
1682 Serial.println(" verifies console-level verifyw / verifyb flow on fixed devices");
1683 Serial.println(" funcheck api");
1684 Serial.println(" runs representative SlmpClient API checks and clears writes to 0");
1685 Serial.println("funcheck direct devices:");
1686 Serial.print(" verifyw: ");
1687 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice);
1688 Serial.print("..");
1689 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice, 1);
1690 Serial.println();
1691 Serial.print(" verifyb: ");
1692 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckOneBitDevice);
1693 Serial.println();
1694 Serial.println("funcheck api devices:");
1695 Serial.print(" row/wow: ");
1696 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckOneWordDevice);
1697 Serial.println();
1698 Serial.print(" rw/ww: ");
1699 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice);
1700 Serial.print("..");
1701 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice, 1);
1702 Serial.println();
1703 Serial.print(" rb/wb: ");
1704 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckOneBitDevice);
1705 Serial.println();
1706 Serial.print(" rbits/wbits: ");
1707 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckBitArrayDevice);
1708 Serial.print("..");
1709 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckBitArrayDevice, 3);
1710 Serial.println();
1711 Serial.print(" rod/wod: ");
1712 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckOneDWordDevice);
1713 Serial.println();
1714 Serial.print(" rdw/wdw: ");
1715 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckDWordArrayDevice);
1716 Serial.print("..");
1717 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckDWordArrayDevice, 3);
1718 Serial.println();
1719 printFuncheckApiDevices(
1720 " wrand/rr words: ",
1721 kFuncheckRandomWordDevices,
1722 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomWordDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomWordDevices[0])
1723 );
1724 printFuncheckApiDevices(
1725 " wrand/rr dwords: ",
1726 kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices,
1727 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices[0])
1728 );
1729 printFuncheckApiDevices(
1730 " wrandb bits: ",
1731 kFuncheckRandomBitDevices,
1732 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomBitDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomBitDevices[0])
1733 );
1734 Serial.print(" rblk/wblk words: ");
1735 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckBlockWordDevice);
1736 Serial.print("..");
1737 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckBlockWordDevice, 1);
1738 Serial.println();
1739 Serial.print(" rblk/wblk bits: ");
1740 printDeviceAddress(kFuncheckBlockBitDevice);
1741 Serial.println(" packed 1 word");
1742}
1743
1744void printFuncheckSummary(const char* label, const FuncheckSummary& summary) {
1745 Serial.print("funcheck ");
1746 Serial.print(label);
1747 Serial.print(" summary: ok=");
1748 Serial.print(summary.ok);
1749 Serial.print(" fail=");
1750 Serial.println(summary.fail);
1751}
1752
1753FuncheckResult runFuncheckDirectWords() {
1754 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
1755 Serial.println("funcheck direct failed: plc not connected");
1756 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1757 }
1758
1759 const uint16_t expected[] = {nextFuncheckWordValue(), nextFuncheckWordValue()};
1760 printFuncheckWordValues("funcheck randomized_values=", expected, 2);
1761 uint16_t before[2] = {};
1762 uint16_t readback[2] = {};
1763 if (plc.readWords(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice, 2, before, 2) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1764 printLastPlcError("funcheck verifyw before read");
1765 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1766 }
1767 if (plc.writeWords(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice, expected, 2) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1768 printLastPlcError("funcheck verifyw write");
1769 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1770 }
1771 if (plc.readWords(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice, 2, readback, 2) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1772 clearWordsSilently(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice, 2);
1773 printLastPlcError("funcheck verifyw readback");
1774 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1775 }
1776
1777 resetVerificationRecord();
1778 verification.active = true;
1779 verification.kind = VerificationKind::WordWrite;
1780 verification.device = kFuncheckWordArrayDevice;
1781 verification.points = 2;
1782 verification.started_ms = millis();
1783 memcpy(verification.before_words, before, sizeof(before));
1784 memcpy(verification.written_words, expected, sizeof(expected));
1785 memcpy(verification.readback_words, readback, sizeof(readback));
1786 verification.readback_match = wordArraysEqual(expected, readback, 2);
1787 verification.judged = true;
1788 verification.pass = verification.readback_match;
1789 printVerificationSummary();
1790 const FuncheckResult result = verification.readback_match ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
1791 clearVerificationTargetSilently();
1792 resetVerificationRecord();
1793 return result;
1794}
1795
1796FuncheckResult runFuncheckDirectBit() {
1797 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
1798 Serial.println("funcheck direct failed: plc not connected");
1799 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1800 }
1801
1802 bool before = false;
1803 bool readback = false;
1804 if (plc.readOneBit(kFuncheckOneBitDevice, before) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1805 printLastPlcError("funcheck verifyb before read");
1806 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1807 }
1808 if (plc.writeOneBit(kFuncheckOneBitDevice, true) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1809 printLastPlcError("funcheck verifyb write");
1810 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1811 }
1812 if (plc.readOneBit(kFuncheckOneBitDevice, readback) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1813 clearBitsSilently(kFuncheckOneBitDevice, 1);
1814 printLastPlcError("funcheck verifyb readback");
1815 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1816 }
1817
1818 resetVerificationRecord();
1819 verification.active = true;
1820 verification.kind = VerificationKind::BitWrite;
1821 verification.device = kFuncheckOneBitDevice;
1822 verification.points = 1;
1823 verification.started_ms = millis();
1824 verification.before_bit = before;
1825 verification.written_bit = true;
1826 verification.readback_bit = readback;
1827 verification.readback_match = readback;
1828 verification.judged = true;
1829 verification.pass = verification.readback_match;
1830 printVerificationSummary();
1831 const FuncheckResult result = verification.readback_match ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
1832 clearVerificationTargetSilently();
1833 resetVerificationRecord();
1834 return result;
1835}
1836
1837FuncheckSummary runFuncheckDirectSuite() {
1838 struct DirectCase {
1839 const char* name;
1840 FuncheckResult (*run)();
1841 };
1842
1843 const DirectCase cases[] = {
1844 {"verifyw", runFuncheckDirectWords},
1845 {"verifyb", runFuncheckDirectBit},
1846 };
1847
1848 FuncheckSummary summary = {};
1849 Serial.println("funcheck suite=direct");
1850 for (size_t i = 0; i < sizeof(cases) / sizeof(cases[0]); ++i) {
1851 Serial.println("-------------------");
1852 Serial.print("funcheck direct step ");
1853 Serial.print(i + 1);
1854 Serial.print("/");
1855 Serial.println(sizeof(cases) / sizeof(cases[0]));
1856 Serial.print("funcheck direct: ");
1857 Serial.println(cases[i].name);
1858 const FuncheckResult result = cases[i].run();
1859 recordFuncheckResult(summary, result);
1860 Serial.print("funcheck result=");
1861 Serial.println(funcheckResultText(result));
1862 }
1863 printFuncheckSummary("direct", summary);
1864 return summary;
1865}
1866
1867FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiTypeAndFrames() {
1868 slmp::TypeNameInfo type_name = {};
1869 if (plc.readTypeName(type_name) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1870 printLastPlcError("funcheck readTypeName");
1871 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1872 }
1873 if (plc.lastRequestFrameLength() == 0 || plc.lastResponseFrameLength() == 0) {
1874 Serial.println("funcheck readTypeName failed: dump frames are empty");
1875 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1876 }
1877 Serial.print("funcheck model=");
1878 Serial.println(type_name.model);
1879 return FuncheckResult::Ok;
1880}
1881
1882FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiTargetHeader() {
1883 const slmp::TargetAddress current_target = plc.target();
1884 plc.setTarget(current_target);
1885 slmp::TypeNameInfo type_name = {};
1886 if (plc.readTypeName(type_name) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1887 printLastPlcError("funcheck target header");
1888 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1889 }
1890 const uint8_t* frame = plc.lastRequestFrame();
1891 if (plc.lastRequestFrameLength() < 15 || frame == nullptr) {
1892 Serial.println("funcheck target header failed: last request too short");
1893 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1894 }
1895 if (frame[6] != current_target.network || frame[7] != current_target.station ||
1896 readFrameLe16(frame + 8) != current_target.module_io || frame[10] != current_target.multidrop) {
1897 Serial.println("funcheck target header failed: request header mismatch");
1898 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1899 }
1900 return FuncheckResult::Ok;
1901}
1902
1903FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiMonitorAndTimeout() {
1904 const uint16_t original_monitor = plc.monitoringTimer();
1905 const uint32_t original_timeout = plc.timeoutMs();
1906 const uint16_t temporary_monitor = original_monitor == 16U ? 17U : 16U;
1907 const uint32_t temporary_timeout = original_timeout == 3210U ? 3211U : 3210U;
1908
1909 plc.setMonitoringTimer(temporary_monitor);
1910 plc.setTimeoutMs(temporary_timeout);
1911
1912 slmp::TypeNameInfo type_name = {};
1913 const slmp::Error error = plc.readTypeName(type_name);
1914 plc.setMonitoringTimer(original_monitor);
1915 plc.setTimeoutMs(original_timeout);
1916 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1917 printLastPlcError("funcheck monitor/timeout");
1918 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1919 }
1920 const uint8_t* frame = plc.lastRequestFrame();
1921 if (plc.lastRequestFrameLength() < 15 || frame == nullptr) {
1922 Serial.println("funcheck monitor/timeout failed: last request too short");
1923 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1924 }
1925 if (readFrameLe16(frame + 13) != temporary_monitor || plc.timeoutMs() != original_timeout) {
1926 Serial.println("funcheck monitor/timeout failed: state mismatch");
1927 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1928 }
1929 return FuncheckResult::Ok;
1930}
1931
1932FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiOneWord() {
1933 const uint16_t expected = nextFuncheckWordValue();
1934 Serial.print("funcheck randomized_value=");
1935 Serial.println(expected);
1936 if (plc.writeOneWord(kFuncheckOneWordDevice, expected) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1937 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeOneWord");
1938 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1939 }
1940 uint16_t readback = 0;
1941 const slmp::Error error = plc.readOneWord(kFuncheckOneWordDevice, readback);
1942 clearWordsSilently(kFuncheckOneWordDevice, 1);
1943 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1944 printLastPlcError("funcheck readOneWord");
1945 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1946 }
1947 return readback == expected ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
1948}
1949
1950FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiWords() {
1951 const uint16_t expected[] = {nextFuncheckWordValue(), nextFuncheckWordValue()};
1952 printFuncheckWordValues("funcheck randomized_values=", expected, 2);
1953 if (plc.writeWords(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice, expected, 2) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1954 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeWords");
1955 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1956 }
1957 uint16_t readback[2] = {};
1958 const slmp::Error error = plc.readWords(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice, 2, readback, 2);
1959 clearWordsSilently(kFuncheckWordArrayDevice, 2);
1960 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1961 printLastPlcError("funcheck readWords");
1962 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1963 }
1964 return wordArraysEqual(expected, readback, 2) ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
1965}
1966
1967FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiOneBit() {
1968 if (plc.writeOneBit(kFuncheckOneBitDevice, true) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1969 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeOneBit");
1970 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1971 }
1972 bool readback = false;
1973 const slmp::Error error = plc.readOneBit(kFuncheckOneBitDevice, readback);
1974 clearBitsSilently(kFuncheckOneBitDevice, 1);
1975 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1976 printLastPlcError("funcheck readOneBit");
1977 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1978 }
1979 return readback ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
1980}
1981
1982FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiBits() {
1983 const bool expected[] = {true, false, true, false};
1984 if (plc.writeBits(kFuncheckBitArrayDevice, expected, 4) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1985 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeBits");
1986 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1987 }
1988 bool readback[4] = {};
1989 const slmp::Error error = plc.readBits(kFuncheckBitArrayDevice, 4, readback, 4);
1990 clearBitsSilently(kFuncheckBitArrayDevice, 4);
1991 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
1992 printLastPlcError("funcheck readBits");
1993 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
1994 }
1995 return bitArraysEqual(expected, readback, 4) ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
1996}
1997
1998FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiOneDWord() {
1999 const uint32_t expected = nextFuncheckDWordValue();
2000 Serial.print("funcheck randomized_value=");
2001 Serial.println(static_cast<unsigned long>(expected));
2002 if (plc.writeOneDWord(kFuncheckOneDWordDevice, expected) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2003 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeOneDWord");
2004 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2005 }
2006 uint32_t readback = 0;
2007 const slmp::Error error = plc.readOneDWord(kFuncheckOneDWordDevice, readback);
2008 clearDWordsSilently(kFuncheckOneDWordDevice, 1);
2009 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2010 printLastPlcError("funcheck readOneDWord");
2011 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2012 }
2013 return readback == expected ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
2014}
2015
2016FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiDWords() {
2017 const uint32_t expected[] = {nextFuncheckDWordValue(), nextFuncheckDWordValue()};
2018 printFuncheckDWordValues("funcheck randomized_values=", expected, 2);
2019 if (plc.writeDWords(kFuncheckDWordArrayDevice, expected, 2) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2020 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeDWords");
2021 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2022 }
2023 uint32_t readback[2] = {};
2024 const slmp::Error error = plc.readDWords(kFuncheckDWordArrayDevice, 2, readback, 2);
2025 clearDWordsSilently(kFuncheckDWordArrayDevice, 2);
2026 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2027 printLastPlcError("funcheck readDWords");
2028 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2029 }
2030 return dwordArraysEqual(expected, readback, 2) ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
2031}
2032
2033FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiRandomWords() {
2034 const uint16_t expected_words[] = {nextFuncheckWordValue(), nextFuncheckWordValue()};
2035 const uint32_t expected_dwords[] = {nextFuncheckDWordValue()};
2036 printFuncheckWordValues("funcheck randomized_word_values=", expected_words, 2);
2037 printFuncheckDWordValues("funcheck randomized_dword_values=", expected_dwords, 1);
2038 if (plc.writeRandomWords(
2039 kFuncheckRandomWordDevices,
2040 expected_words,
2041 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomWordDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomWordDevices[0]),
2042 kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices,
2043 expected_dwords,
2044 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices[0])) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2045 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeRandomWords");
2046 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2047 }
2048
2049 uint16_t readback_words[2] = {};
2050 uint32_t readback_dwords[1] = {};
2051 const slmp::Error error = plc.readRandom(
2052 kFuncheckRandomWordDevices,
2053 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomWordDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomWordDevices[0]),
2054 readback_words,
2055 2,
2056 kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices,
2057 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices[0]),
2058 readback_dwords,
2059 1
2060 );
2061 clearRandomWordsSilently(
2062 kFuncheckRandomWordDevices,
2063 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomWordDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomWordDevices[0]),
2064 kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices,
2065 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomDWordDevices[0])
2066 );
2067 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2068 printLastPlcError("funcheck readRandom");
2069 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2070 }
2071 return wordArraysEqual(expected_words, readback_words, 2) &&
2072 dwordArraysEqual(expected_dwords, readback_dwords, 1)
2073 ? FuncheckResult::Ok
2074 : FuncheckResult::Fail;
2075}
2076
2077FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiRandomBits() {
2078 const bool expected[] = {true, false};
2079 if (plc.writeRandomBits(
2080 kFuncheckRandomBitDevices,
2081 expected,
2082 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomBitDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomBitDevices[0])) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2083 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeRandomBits");
2084 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2085 }
2086 bool first = false;
2087 bool second = false;
2088 const slmp::Error first_error = plc.readOneBit(kFuncheckRandomBitDevices[0], first);
2089 const slmp::Error second_error = plc.readOneBit(kFuncheckRandomBitDevices[1], second);
2090 clearRandomBitsSilently(
2091 kFuncheckRandomBitDevices,
2092 sizeof(kFuncheckRandomBitDevices) / sizeof(kFuncheckRandomBitDevices[0])
2093 );
2094 if (first_error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2095 printLastPlcError("funcheck readRandomBits first");
2096 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2097 }
2098 if (second_error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2099 printLastPlcError("funcheck readRandomBits second");
2100 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2101 }
2102 return (first == expected[0] && second == expected[1]) ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
2103}
2104
2105FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiWordBlock() {
2106 const uint16_t expected_words[] = {nextFuncheckWordValue(), nextFuncheckWordValue()};
2107 printFuncheckWordValues("funcheck randomized_word_values=", expected_words, 2);
2108 const slmp::DeviceBlockWrite word_blocks[] = {
2109 {kFuncheckBlockWordDevice, expected_words, 2},
2110 };
2111 if (plc.writeBlock(word_blocks, 1, nullptr, 0) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2112 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeBlock words");
2113 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2114 }
2115
2116 const slmp::DeviceBlockRead read_word_blocks[] = {
2117 {kFuncheckBlockWordDevice, 2},
2118 };
2119 uint16_t readback_words[2] = {};
2120 const slmp::Error error = plc.readBlock(read_word_blocks, 1, nullptr, 0, readback_words, 2, nullptr, 0);
2121 clearWordsSilently(kFuncheckBlockWordDevice, 2);
2122 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2123 printLastPlcError("funcheck readBlock words");
2124 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2125 }
2126 return wordArraysEqual(expected_words, readback_words, 2) ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
2127}
2128
2129FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiBitBlock() {
2130 const uint16_t expected_bits[] = {nextFuncheckWordValue()};
2131 printFuncheckWordValues("funcheck randomized_packed_bits=", expected_bits, 1);
2132 const slmp::DeviceBlockWrite bit_blocks[] = {
2133 {kFuncheckBlockBitDevice, expected_bits, 1},
2134 };
2135 if (plc.writeBlock(nullptr, 0, bit_blocks, 1) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2136 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeBlock bits");
2137 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2138 }
2139
2140 const slmp::DeviceBlockRead read_bit_blocks[] = {
2141 {kFuncheckBlockBitDevice, 1},
2142 };
2143 uint16_t readback_bits[1] = {};
2144 const slmp::Error error = plc.readBlock(nullptr, 0, read_bit_blocks, 1, nullptr, 0, readback_bits, 1);
2145 clearPackedBitWordsSilently(kFuncheckBlockBitDevice, 1);
2146 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2147 printLastPlcError("funcheck readBlock bits");
2148 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2149 }
2150 return wordArraysEqual(expected_bits, readback_bits, 1) ? FuncheckResult::Ok : FuncheckResult::Fail;
2151}
2152
2153FuncheckResult runFuncheckApiMixedBlock() {
2154 const uint16_t expected_words[] = {nextFuncheckWordValue(), nextFuncheckWordValue()};
2155 const uint16_t expected_bits[] = {nextFuncheckWordValue()};
2156 printFuncheckWordValues("funcheck randomized_word_values=", expected_words, 2);
2157 printFuncheckWordValues("funcheck randomized_packed_bits=", expected_bits, 1);
2158 const slmp::DeviceBlockWrite word_blocks[] = {
2159 {kFuncheckBlockWordDevice, expected_words, 2},
2160 };
2161 const slmp::DeviceBlockWrite bit_blocks[] = {
2162 {kFuncheckBlockBitDevice, expected_bits, 1},
2163 };
2164 if (plc.writeBlock(word_blocks, 1, bit_blocks, 1) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2165 printLastPlcError("funcheck writeBlock mixed");
2166 clearBlockSilently(kFuncheckBlockWordDevice, 2, kFuncheckBlockBitDevice, 1);
2167 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2168 }
2169
2170 const slmp::DeviceBlockRead read_word_blocks[] = {
2171 {kFuncheckBlockWordDevice, 2},
2172 };
2173 const slmp::DeviceBlockRead read_bit_blocks[] = {
2174 {kFuncheckBlockBitDevice, 1},
2175 };
2176 uint16_t readback_words[2] = {};
2177 uint16_t readback_bits[1] = {};
2178 const slmp::Error error =
2179 plc.readBlock(read_word_blocks, 1, read_bit_blocks, 1, readback_words, 2, readback_bits, 1);
2180 clearBlockSilently(kFuncheckBlockWordDevice, 2, kFuncheckBlockBitDevice, 1);
2181 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2182 printLastPlcError("funcheck readBlock mixed");
2183 return FuncheckResult::Fail;
2184 }
2185 return wordArraysEqual(expected_words, readback_words, 2) &&
2186 wordArraysEqual(expected_bits, readback_bits, 1)
2187 ? FuncheckResult::Ok
2188 : FuncheckResult::Fail;
2189}
2190
2191FuncheckSummary runFuncheckApiSuite() {
2192 struct ApiCase {
2193 const char* name;
2194 FuncheckResult (*run)();
2195 };
2196
2197 const ApiCase cases[] = {
2198 {"readTypeName + dump", runFuncheckApiTypeAndFrames},
2199 {"target header", runFuncheckApiTargetHeader},
2200 {"monitor + timeout", runFuncheckApiMonitorAndTimeout},
2201 {"readOneWord/writeOneWord", runFuncheckApiOneWord},
2202 {"readWords/writeWords", runFuncheckApiWords},
2203 {"readOneBit/writeOneBit", runFuncheckApiOneBit},
2204 {"readBits/writeBits", runFuncheckApiBits},
2205 {"readOneDWord/writeOneDWord", runFuncheckApiOneDWord},
2206 {"readDWords/writeDWords", runFuncheckApiDWords},
2207 {"readRandom/writeRandomWords", runFuncheckApiRandomWords},
2208 {"writeRandomBits", runFuncheckApiRandomBits},
2209 {"readBlock/writeBlock words", runFuncheckApiWordBlock},
2210 {"readBlock/writeBlock bits", runFuncheckApiBitBlock},
2211 {"readBlock/writeBlock mixed", runFuncheckApiMixedBlock},
2212 };
2213
2214 FuncheckSummary summary = {};
2215 Serial.println("funcheck suite=api");
2216 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
2217 Serial.println("funcheck api failed: plc not connected");
2218 summary.fail = 1;
2219 return summary;
2220 }
2221
2222 for (size_t i = 0; i < sizeof(cases) / sizeof(cases[0]); ++i) {
2223 Serial.println("-------------------");
2224 Serial.print("funcheck api step ");
2225 Serial.print(i + 1);
2226 Serial.print("/");
2227 Serial.println(sizeof(cases) / sizeof(cases[0]));
2228 Serial.print("funcheck api: ");
2229 Serial.println(cases[i].name);
2230 const FuncheckResult result = cases[i].run();
2231 recordFuncheckResult(summary, result);
2232 Serial.print("funcheck result=");
2233 Serial.println(funcheckResultText(result));
2234 }
2235
2236 printFuncheckSummary("api", summary);
2237 return summary;
2238}
2239
2240void runFuncheckAll() {
2241 stopEndurance(false, false);
2242 stopReconnect(false);
2243 resetVerificationRecord();
2244 const FuncheckSummary direct_summary = runFuncheckDirectSuite();
2245 const FuncheckSummary api_summary = runFuncheckApiSuite();
2246 FuncheckSummary total = {};
2247 total.ok = direct_summary.ok + api_summary.ok;
2248 total.fail = direct_summary.fail + api_summary.fail;
2249 printFuncheckSummary("all", total);
2250}
2251
2252void runFuncheckDirectOnly() {
2253 stopEndurance(false, false);
2254 stopReconnect(false);
2255 resetVerificationRecord();
2256 (void)runFuncheckDirectSuite();
2257}
2258
2259void runFuncheckApiOnly() {
2260 stopEndurance(false, false);
2261 stopReconnect(false);
2262 resetVerificationRecord();
2263 (void)runFuncheckApiSuite();
2264}
2265
2266void runFullScan() {
2267 Serial.println("=== SLMP Master Full Scan Start ===");
2268 printEvidenceHeader();
2269
2270 auto report = [](const char* code, const char* name, slmp::Error err) {
2271 Serial.print("| "); Serial.print(code);
2272 Serial.print(" | "); Serial.print(name);
2273 if (err == slmp::Error::Ok) {
2274 Serial.println(" | PASS | - |");
2275 } else {
2276 Serial.print(" | FAIL | ");
2277 Serial.print(slmp::errorString(err));
2278 if (err == slmp::Error::PlcError) {
2279 Serial.print(" (0x");
2280 Serial.print(plc.lastEndCode(), HEX);
2281 Serial.print(")");
2282 }
2283 Serial.println(" |");
2284 }
2285 };
2286
2287 // 1. Basic R/W
2288 uint16_t wval = 0;
2289 bool bval = false;
2290 report("0401", "Read Device (Word)", plc.readOneWord({slmp::DeviceCode::D, 130}, wval));
2291 report("0401", "Read Device (Bit)", plc.readOneBit({slmp::DeviceCode::M, 120}, bval));
2292 report("1401", "Write Device (Word)", plc.writeOneWord({slmp::DeviceCode::D, 130}, 0));
2293 report("1401", "Write Device (Bit)", plc.writeOneBit({slmp::DeviceCode::M, 120}, false));
2294
2295 // 2. Random R/W
2296 slmp::DeviceAddress rdev = {slmp::DeviceCode::D, 135};
2297 uint16_t rval = 0;
2298 report("0403", "Read Random (Word)", plc.readRandom(&rdev, 1, &rval, 1, nullptr, 0, nullptr, 0));
2299 report("1402", "Write Random (Word)", plc.writeRandomWords(&rdev, &rval, 1, nullptr, nullptr, 0));
2300 slmp::DeviceAddress brdev = {slmp::DeviceCode::M, 125};
2301 report("1402", "Write Random (Bit)", plc.writeRandomBits(&brdev, &bval, 1));
2302
2303 // 3. Self test loopback (0619)
2304 const uint8_t loopback_req[] = {'O', 'K'};
2305 uint8_t loopback_resp[8] = {};
2306 size_t loopback_resp_len = 0;
2307 report(
2308 "0619",
2309 "Self Test Loopback",
2310 plc.selfTestLoopback(
2311 loopback_req,
2312 sizeof(loopback_req),
2313 loopback_resp,
2314 sizeof(loopback_resp),
2315 loopback_resp_len
2316 )
2317 );
2318
2319 // 4. Extensions
2320 slmp::TypeNameInfo type_info = {};
2321 report("0101", "Read Type Name", plc.readTypeName(type_info));
2322 slmp::DeviceBlockRead rb = {{slmp::DeviceCode::D, 140}, 1};
2323 uint16_t rb_word = 0;
2324 report("0406", "Read Block", plc.readBlock(&rb, 1, nullptr, 0, &rb_word, 1, nullptr, 0));
2325
2326 Serial.println("=== Full Scan Complete ===");
2327}
2328
2329void fullscanCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
2330 (void)tokens;
2331 (void)token_count;
2332 if (!plc.connected() && !connectPlc(true)) {
2333 Serial.println("fullscan failed: plc not connected");
2334 return;
2335 }
2336 runFullScan();
2337}
2338
2339void funcheckCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
2340 if (token_count == 1) {
2341 printEvidenceHeader();
2342 runFuncheckAll();
2343 return;
2344 }
2345
2346 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[1]);
2347 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "ALL") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "START") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "ON") == 0) {
2348 printEvidenceHeader();
2349 runFuncheckAll();
2350 return;
2351 }
2352 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "DIRECT") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "DEVICES") == 0) {
2353 printEvidenceHeader();
2354 runFuncheckDirectOnly();
2355 return;
2356 }
2357 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "API") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "FUNCTIONS") == 0) {
2358 printEvidenceHeader();
2359 runFuncheckApiOnly();
2360 return;
2361 }
2362 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "LIST") == 0) {
2363 printFuncheckList();
2364 return;
2365 }
2366
2367 Serial.println("funcheck usage: funcheck [all|direct|api|list]");
2368}
2369
2370void clearEnduranceTargetsSilently() {
2371 clearWordsSilently(kEnduranceOneWordDevice, 1);
2372 clearWordsSilently(kEnduranceWordArrayDevice, 2);
2373 clearBitsSilently(kEnduranceOneBitDevice, 1);
2374 clearBitsSilently(kEnduranceBitArrayDevice, 4);
2375 clearDWordsSilently(kEnduranceOneDWordDevice, 1);
2376 clearDWordsSilently(kEnduranceDWordArrayDevice, 2);
2377 clearRandomWordsSilently(
2378 kEnduranceRandomWordDevices,
2379 sizeof(kEnduranceRandomWordDevices) / sizeof(kEnduranceRandomWordDevices[0]),
2380 kEnduranceRandomDWordDevices,
2381 sizeof(kEnduranceRandomDWordDevices) / sizeof(kEnduranceRandomDWordDevices[0])
2382 );
2383 clearRandomBitsSilently(
2384 kEnduranceRandomBitDevices,
2385 sizeof(kEnduranceRandomBitDevices) / sizeof(kEnduranceRandomBitDevices[0])
2386 );
2387 clearBlockSilently(kEnduranceBlockWordDevice, 2, kEnduranceBlockBitDevice, 1);
2388}
2389
2390void printEnduranceList() {
2391 Serial.println("endurance modes:");
2392 Serial.println(" endurance");
2393 Serial.println(" starts continuous read/write durability test");
2394 Serial.println(" endurance 1000");
2395 Serial.println(" runs 1000 cycles, then stops");
2396 Serial.println(" endurance status");
2397 Serial.println(" endurance stop");
2398}
2399
2400void printEnduranceSummary(const char* label) {
2401 Serial.print(label);
2402 Serial.print(" attempts=");
2403 Serial.print(endurance.attempts);
2404 Serial.print(" ok=");
2405 Serial.print(endurance.ok);
2406 Serial.print(" fail=");
2407 Serial.print(endurance.fail);
2408 Serial.print(" elapsed_ms=");
2409 Serial.print(endurance.started_ms == 0 ? 0U : (millis() - endurance.started_ms));
2410 Serial.print(" last_cycle_ms=");
2411 Serial.print(endurance.last_cycle_ms);
2412 Serial.print(" avg_ms=");
2413 if (endurance.attempts == 0) {
2414 Serial.print(0);
2415 } else {
2416 Serial.print(static_cast<uint32_t>(endurance.total_cycle_ms / endurance.attempts));
2417 }
2418 Serial.print(" min_ms=");
2419 Serial.print(endurance.attempts == 0 ? 0U : endurance.min_cycle_ms);
2420 Serial.print(" max_ms=");
2421 Serial.println(endurance.max_cycle_ms);
2422}
2423
2424void printEnduranceStatus() {
2425 Serial.print("endurance_active=");
2426 Serial.println(endurance.active ? "yes" : "no");
2427 Serial.print("endurance_cycle_limit=");
2428 Serial.println(endurance.cycle_limit);
2429 Serial.print("endurance_last_step=");
2430 Serial.println(endurance.last_step[0] == '\0' ? "<none>" : endurance.last_step);
2431 Serial.print("endurance_last_issue=");
2432 Serial.println(endurance.last_issue[0] == '\0' ? "<none>" : endurance.last_issue);
2433 Serial.print("endurance_last_error=");
2434 Serial.println(slmp::errorString(endurance.last_error));
2435 Serial.print("endurance_last_end_code=0x");
2436 Serial.println(endurance.last_end_code, HEX);
2437 printEnduranceSummary("endurance status:");
2438}
2439
2440void stopEndurance(bool print_summary, bool /*failed*/) {
2441 if (!endurance.active) {
2442 return;
2443 }
2444 endurance.active = false;
2445 clearEnduranceTargetsSilently();
2446 if (print_summary) {
2447 printEnduranceSummary("endurance summary:");
2448 }
2449}
2450
2451bool failEnduranceCycle(const char* step, const char* issue, const char* plc_label, bool use_plc_error) {
2452 copyText(endurance.last_step, sizeof(endurance.last_step), step);
2453 copyText(endurance.last_issue, sizeof(endurance.last_issue), issue);
2454 endurance.last_error = use_plc_error ? plc.lastError() : slmp::Error::Ok;
2455 endurance.last_end_code = use_plc_error ? plc.lastEndCode() : 0;
2456 ++endurance.attempts;
2457 ++endurance.fail;
2458 Serial.print("endurance failed at ");
2459 Serial.print(step);
2460 Serial.print(": ");
2461 Serial.println(issue);
2462 if (use_plc_error && plc_label != nullptr) {
2463 printLastPlcError(plc_label);
2464 }
2465 stopEndurance(true, true);
2466 return false;
2467}
2468
2469bool recordEnduranceCycleTiming(uint32_t started_ms) {
2470 endurance.last_cycle_ms = millis() - started_ms;
2471 if (endurance.attempts == 0 || endurance.last_cycle_ms < endurance.min_cycle_ms) {
2472 endurance.min_cycle_ms = endurance.last_cycle_ms;
2473 }
2474 if (endurance.last_cycle_ms > endurance.max_cycle_ms) {
2475 endurance.max_cycle_ms = endurance.last_cycle_ms;
2476 }
2477 endurance.total_cycle_ms += endurance.last_cycle_ms;
2478 if (millis() - endurance.last_report_ms >= kEnduranceReportIntervalMs) {
2479 printEnduranceSummary("endurance progress:");
2480 endurance.last_report_ms = millis();
2481 }
2482 return true;
2483}
2484
2485bool runEnduranceCycle() {
2486 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
2487 return failEnduranceCycle("connect", "plc not connected", nullptr, false);
2488 }
2489
2490 const uint32_t started_ms = millis();
2491 copyText(endurance.last_issue, sizeof(endurance.last_issue), "");
2492 endurance.last_error = slmp::Error::Ok;
2493 endurance.last_end_code = 0;
2494
2495 const uint16_t one_word_value = nextFuncheckWordValue();
2496 uint16_t one_word_readback = 0;
2497 if (plc.writeOneWord(kEnduranceOneWordDevice, one_word_value) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2498 return failEnduranceCycle("writeOneWord", "plc write failed", "endurance writeOneWord", true);
2499 }
2500 if (plc.readOneWord(kEnduranceOneWordDevice, one_word_readback) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2501 return failEnduranceCycle("readOneWord", "plc read failed", "endurance readOneWord", true);
2502 }
2503 if (one_word_readback != one_word_value) {
2504 return failEnduranceCycle("readOneWord/writeOneWord", "readback mismatch", nullptr, false);
2505 }
2506 clearWordsSilently(kEnduranceOneWordDevice, 1);
2507
2508 const uint16_t word_values[] = {nextFuncheckWordValue(), nextFuncheckWordValue()};
2509 uint16_t word_readback[2] = {};
2510 if (plc.writeWords(kEnduranceWordArrayDevice, word_values, 2) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2511 return failEnduranceCycle("writeWords", "plc write failed", "endurance writeWords", true);
2512 }
2513 if (plc.readWords(kEnduranceWordArrayDevice, 2, word_readback, 2) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2514 return failEnduranceCycle("readWords", "plc read failed", "endurance readWords", true);
2515 }
