2516 if (!wordArraysEqual(word_values, word_readback, 2)) {
2517 return failEnduranceCycle("readWords/writeWords", "readback mismatch", nullptr, false);
2518 }
2519 clearWordsSilently(kEnduranceWordArrayDevice, 2);
2520
2521 bool one_bit_readback = false;
2522 if (plc.writeOneBit(kEnduranceOneBitDevice, true) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2523 return failEnduranceCycle("writeOneBit", "plc write failed", "endurance writeOneBit", true);
2524 }
2525 if (plc.readOneBit(kEnduranceOneBitDevice, one_bit_readback) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2526 return failEnduranceCycle("readOneBit", "plc read failed", "endurance readOneBit", true);
2527 }
2528 if (!one_bit_readback) {
2529 return failEnduranceCycle("readOneBit/writeOneBit", "readback mismatch", nullptr, false);
2530 }
2531 clearBitsSilently(kEnduranceOneBitDevice, 1);
2532
2533 const bool bit_values[] = {true, false, true, true};
2534 bool bit_readback[4] = {};
2535 if (plc.writeBits(kEnduranceBitArrayDevice, bit_values, 4) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2536 return failEnduranceCycle("writeBits", "plc write failed", "endurance writeBits", true);
2537 }
2538 if (plc.readBits(kEnduranceBitArrayDevice, 4, bit_readback, 4) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2539 return failEnduranceCycle("readBits", "plc read failed", "endurance readBits", true);
2540 }
2541 if (!bitArraysEqual(bit_values, bit_readback, 4)) {
2542 return failEnduranceCycle("readBits/writeBits", "readback mismatch", nullptr, false);
2543 }
2544 clearBitsSilently(kEnduranceBitArrayDevice, 4);
2545
2546 const uint32_t one_dword_value = nextFuncheckDWordValue();
2547 uint32_t one_dword_readback = 0;
2548 if (plc.writeOneDWord(kEnduranceOneDWordDevice, one_dword_value) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2549 return failEnduranceCycle("writeOneDWord", "plc write failed", "endurance writeOneDWord", true);
2550 }
2551 if (plc.readOneDWord(kEnduranceOneDWordDevice, one_dword_readback) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2552 return failEnduranceCycle("readOneDWord", "plc read failed", "endurance readOneDWord", true);
2553 }
2554 if (one_dword_readback != one_dword_value) {
2555 return failEnduranceCycle("readOneDWord/writeOneDWord", "readback mismatch", nullptr, false);
2556 }
2557 clearDWordsSilently(kEnduranceOneDWordDevice, 1);
2558 ++endurance.attempts;
2559 ++endurance.ok;
2560 copyText(endurance.last_step, sizeof(endurance.last_step), "cycle_ok");
2561 recordEnduranceCycleTiming(started_ms);
2562 return true;
2563}
2564
2565void startEndurance(uint32_t cycle_limit) {
2566 stopReconnect(false);
2567 resetVerificationRecord();
2568 clearEnduranceTargetsSilently();
2569 resetEnduranceSession();
2570 endurance.active = true;
2571 endurance.started_ms = millis();
2572 endurance.next_cycle_due_ms = endurance.started_ms;
2573 endurance.last_report_ms = endurance.started_ms;
2574 endurance.cycle_limit = cycle_limit;
2575 copyText(endurance.last_step, sizeof(endurance.last_step), "starting");
2576 copyText(endurance.last_issue, sizeof(endurance.last_issue), "none");
2577 Serial.println("endurance=on");
2578 Serial.print("endurance_cycle_limit=");
2579 Serial.println(cycle_limit);
2580 printEvidenceHeader();
2581}
2582
2583void enduranceCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
2584 if (token_count == 1) {
2585 startEndurance(0);
2586 return;
2587 }
2588
2589 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[1]);
2590 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "STATUS") == 0) {
2591 printEnduranceStatus();
2592 return;
2593 }
2594 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "STOP") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "OFF") == 0) {
2595 Serial.println("endurance=off");
2596 stopEndurance(true, false);
2597 return;
2598 }
2599 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "LIST") == 0) {
2600 printEnduranceList();
2601 return;
2602 }
2603 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "START") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "ON") == 0) {
2604 if (token_count >= 3) {
2605 unsigned long parsed_limit = 0;
2606 if (!parseUnsignedValue(tokens[2], parsed_limit, 10)) {
2607 Serial.println("endurance usage: endurance [start [cycles]|status|stop|list]");
2608 return;
2609 }
2610 startEndurance(static_cast<uint32_t>(parsed_limit));
2611 return;
2612 }
2613 startEndurance(0);
2614 return;
2615 }
2616
2617 unsigned long cycle_limit = 0;
2618 if (parseUnsignedValue(tokens[1], cycle_limit, 10)) {
2619 startEndurance(static_cast<uint32_t>(cycle_limit));
2620 return;
2621 }
2622
2623 Serial.println("endurance usage: endurance [start [cycles]|status|stop|list]");
2624}
2625
2626void pollEnduranceTest() {
2627 if (!endurance.active) {
2628 return;
2629 }
2630 if (millis() < endurance.next_cycle_due_ms) {
2631 return;
2632 }
2633 if (!runEnduranceCycle()) {
2634 printPrompt();
2635 return;
2636 }
2637 if (endurance.cycle_limit > 0 && endurance.ok >= endurance.cycle_limit) {
2638 Serial.println("endurance limit reached");
2639 stopEndurance(true, false);
2640 printPrompt();
2641 return;
2642 }
2643 endurance.next_cycle_due_ms = millis() + kEnduranceCycleGapMs;
2644}
2645
2646void printReconnectList() {
2647 Serial.println("reconnect modes:");
2648 Serial.println(" reconnect");
2649 Serial.println(" starts endless reconnect verification");
2650 Serial.println(" reconnect 1000");
2651 Serial.println(" runs 1000 attempts, then stops");
2652 Serial.println(" reconnect status");
2653 Serial.println(" reconnect stop");
2654 Serial.print(" probe device: ");
2655 printDeviceAddress(kEnduranceOneWordDevice);
2656 Serial.println();
2657}
2658
2659uint32_t reconnectRetryGapMs() {
2660 uint32_t retry_gap_ms = kReconnectCycleGapMs;
2661 uint32_t remaining_failures = reconnect.consecutive_failures;
2662 while (remaining_failures > 1U && retry_gap_ms < kReconnectMaxCycleGapMs) {
2663 const uint32_t doubled_gap_ms = retry_gap_ms * 2U;
2664 retry_gap_ms = doubled_gap_ms > kReconnectMaxCycleGapMs ? kReconnectMaxCycleGapMs : doubled_gap_ms;
2665 --remaining_failures;
2666 }
2667 return retry_gap_ms;
2668}
2669
2670void printReconnectSummary(const char* label) {
2671 Serial.print(label);
2672 Serial.print(" attempts=");
2673 Serial.print(reconnect.attempts);
2674 Serial.print(" ok=");
2675 Serial.print(reconnect.ok);
2676 Serial.print(" fail=");
2677 Serial.print(reconnect.fail);
2678 Serial.print(" recoveries=");
2679 Serial.print(reconnect.recoveries);
2680 Serial.print(" consecutive_failures=");
2681 Serial.print(reconnect.consecutive_failures);
2682 Serial.print(" max_consecutive_failures=");
2683 Serial.print(reconnect.max_consecutive_failures);
2684 Serial.print(" elapsed_ms=");
2685 Serial.print(reconnect.started_ms == 0 ? 0U : (millis() - reconnect.started_ms));
2686 Serial.print(" last_cycle_ms=");
2687 Serial.print(reconnect.last_cycle_ms);
2688 Serial.print(" avg_ms=");
2689 if (reconnect.attempts == 0) {
2690 Serial.print(0);
2691 } else {
2692 Serial.print(static_cast<uint32_t>(reconnect.total_cycle_ms / reconnect.attempts));
2693 }
2694 Serial.print(" min_ms=");
2695 Serial.print(reconnect.attempts == 0 ? 0U : reconnect.min_cycle_ms);
2696 Serial.print(" max_ms=");
2697 Serial.print(reconnect.max_cycle_ms);
2698 Serial.print(" retry_gap_ms=");
2699 Serial.println(reconnectRetryGapMs());
2700}
2701
2702void printReconnectStatus() {
2703 Serial.print("reconnect_active=");
2704 Serial.println(reconnect.active ? "yes" : "no");
2705 Serial.print("reconnect_cycle_limit=");
2706 Serial.println(reconnect.cycle_limit);
2707 Serial.print("reconnect_last_step=");
2708 Serial.println(reconnect.last_step[0] == '\0' ? "<none>" : reconnect.last_step);
2709 Serial.print("reconnect_last_issue=");
2710 Serial.println(reconnect.last_issue[0] == '\0' ? "<none>" : reconnect.last_issue);
2711 Serial.print("reconnect_last_error=");
2712 Serial.println(slmp::errorString(reconnect.last_error));
2713 Serial.print("reconnect_last_end_code=0x");
2714 Serial.println(reconnect.last_end_code, HEX);
2715 printReconnectSummary("reconnect status:");
2716}
2717
2718void stopReconnect(bool print_summary) {
2719 if (!reconnect.active) {
2720 return;
2721 }
2722 reconnect.active = false;
2723 if (print_summary) {
2724 printReconnectSummary("reconnect summary:");
2725 }
2726}
2727
2728void finishReconnectCycleTiming(uint32_t started_ms) {
2729 reconnect.last_cycle_ms = millis() - started_ms;
2730 if (reconnect.attempts == 0 || reconnect.last_cycle_ms < reconnect.min_cycle_ms) {
2731 reconnect.min_cycle_ms = reconnect.last_cycle_ms;
2732 }
2733 if (reconnect.last_cycle_ms > reconnect.max_cycle_ms) {
2734 reconnect.max_cycle_ms = reconnect.last_cycle_ms;
2735 }
2736 reconnect.total_cycle_ms += reconnect.last_cycle_ms;
2737 if (millis() - reconnect.last_report_ms >= kReconnectReportIntervalMs) {
2738 printReconnectSummary("reconnect progress:");
2739 reconnect.last_report_ms = millis();
2740 }
2741}
2742
2743bool runReconnectCycle() {
2744 const uint32_t started_ms = millis();
2745 const uint32_t failure_streak_before = reconnect.consecutive_failures;
2746 copyText(reconnect.last_issue, sizeof(reconnect.last_issue), "none");
2747 reconnect.last_error = slmp::Error::Ok;
2748 reconnect.last_end_code = 0;
2749
2750 uint16_t probe_value = 0;
2751 bool ok = false;
2752 const char* step = "connect";
2753 const char* issue = "plc not connected";
2754 bool use_plc_error = false;
2755
2756 if (connectPlc(false)) {
2757 step = "readOneWord";
2758 issue = "plc read failed";
2759 use_plc_error = true;
2760 if (plc.readOneWord(kEnduranceOneWordDevice, probe_value) == slmp::Error::Ok) {
2761 ok = true;
2762 }
2763 }
2764
2765 ++reconnect.attempts;
2766 copyText(reconnect.last_step, sizeof(reconnect.last_step), step);
2767
2768 if (ok) {
2769 ++reconnect.ok;
2770 reconnect.consecutive_failures = 0;
2771 if (failure_streak_before > 0U) {
2772 ++reconnect.recoveries;
2773 Serial.print("reconnect recovered after ");
2774 Serial.print(failure_streak_before);
2775 Serial.print(" failed attempts; probe=");
2776 printDeviceAddress(kEnduranceOneWordDevice);
2777 Serial.print(" value=");
2778 Serial.println(probe_value);
2779 }
2780 finishReconnectCycleTiming(started_ms);
2781 return true;
2782 }
2783
2784 ++reconnect.fail;
2785 ++reconnect.consecutive_failures;
2786 if (reconnect.consecutive_failures > reconnect.max_consecutive_failures) {
2787 reconnect.max_consecutive_failures = reconnect.consecutive_failures;
2788 }
2789 copyText(reconnect.last_issue, sizeof(reconnect.last_issue), issue);
2790 reconnect.last_error = use_plc_error ? plc.lastError() : slmp::Error::Ok;
2791 reconnect.last_end_code = use_plc_error ? plc.lastEndCode() : 0;
2792 plc.close();
2793 if (reconnect.consecutive_failures == 1U) {
2794 Serial.print("reconnect lost at ");
2795 Serial.print(step);
2796 Serial.print(": ");
2797 Serial.println(issue);
2798 if (use_plc_error) {
2799 Serial.print("reconnect last_error=");
2800 Serial.print(slmp::errorString(reconnect.last_error));
2801 Serial.print(" end=0x");
2802 Serial.println(reconnect.last_end_code, HEX);
2803 }
2804 }
2805 finishReconnectCycleTiming(started_ms);
2806 return true;
2807}
2808
2809void startReconnect(uint32_t cycle_limit) {
2810 stopEndurance(false, false);
2811 resetVerificationRecord();
2812 resetReconnectSession();
2813 reconnect.active = true;
2814 reconnect.started_ms = millis();
2815 reconnect.next_cycle_due_ms = reconnect.started_ms;
2816 reconnect.last_report_ms = reconnect.started_ms;
2817 reconnect.cycle_limit = cycle_limit;
2818 copyText(reconnect.last_step, sizeof(reconnect.last_step), "starting");
2819 copyText(reconnect.last_issue, sizeof(reconnect.last_issue), "none");
2820 Serial.println("reconnect=on");
2821 Serial.print("reconnect_cycle_limit=");
2822 Serial.println(cycle_limit);
2823 printEvidenceHeader();
2824}
2825
2826void reconnectCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
2827 if (token_count == 1) {
2828 startReconnect(0);
2829 return;
2830 }
2831
2832 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[1]);
2833 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "STATUS") == 0) {
2834 printReconnectStatus();
2835 return;
2836 }
2837 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "STOP") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "OFF") == 0) {
2838 Serial.println("reconnect=off");
2839 stopReconnect(true);
2840 return;
2841 }
2842 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "LIST") == 0) {
2843 printReconnectList();
2844 return;
2845 }
2846 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "START") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "ON") == 0) {
2847 if (token_count >= 3) {
2848 unsigned long parsed_limit = 0;
2849 if (!parseUnsignedValue(tokens[2], parsed_limit, 10)) {
2850 Serial.println("reconnect usage: reconnect [start [cycles]|status|stop|list]");
2851 return;
2852 }
2853 startReconnect(static_cast<uint32_t>(parsed_limit));
2854 return;
2855 }
2856 startReconnect(0);
2857 return;
2858 }
2859
2860 unsigned long cycle_limit = 0;
2861 if (parseUnsignedValue(tokens[1], cycle_limit, 10)) {
2862 startReconnect(static_cast<uint32_t>(cycle_limit));
2863 return;
2864 }
2865
2866 Serial.println("reconnect usage: reconnect [start [cycles]|status|stop|list]");
2867}
2868
2869void pollReconnectTest() {
2870 if (!reconnect.active) {
2871 return;
2872 }
2873 if (millis() < reconnect.next_cycle_due_ms) {
2874 return;
2875 }
2876 (void)runReconnectCycle();
2877 if (reconnect.cycle_limit > 0 && reconnect.attempts >= reconnect.cycle_limit) {
2878 Serial.println("reconnect limit reached");
2879 stopReconnect(true);
2880 printPrompt();
2881 return;
2882 }
2883 reconnect.next_cycle_due_ms = millis() + reconnectRetryGapMs();
2884}
2885
2886void fillTxlimitWords(uint16_t* values, size_t count, uint16_t seed) {
2887 for (size_t i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
2888 values[i] = static_cast<uint16_t>(seed + i);
2889 }
2890}
2891
2892void printTxlimitSummary() {
2893 Serial.print("tx_buffer_size=");
2894 Serial.println(kTxBufferSize);
2895 Serial.print("request_header_size=");
2896 Serial.println(kSlmpRequestHeaderSize);
2897 Serial.print("max_payload_fit=");
2898 Serial.println(kTxPayloadBudget);
2899 Serial.print("writeWords max_count=");
2900 Serial.print(kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount);
2901 Serial.print(" frame_bytes=");
2902 Serial.println(kSlmpRequestHeaderSize + 8U + (kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount * 2U));
2903 Serial.print("writeDWords max_count=");
2904 Serial.print(kTxLimitWriteDWordsMaxCount);
2905 Serial.print(" frame_bytes=");
2906 Serial.println(kSlmpRequestHeaderSize + 8U + (kTxLimitWriteDWordsMaxCount * 4U));
2907 Serial.print("writeBits max_points=");
2908 Serial.print(kTxLimitWriteBitsMaxCount);
2909 Serial.print(" frame_bytes=");
2910 Serial.println(kSlmpRequestHeaderSize + 8U + ((kTxLimitWriteBitsMaxCount + 1U) / 2U));
2911 Serial.print("writeRandomWords max_word_devices=");
2912 Serial.print(kTxLimitWriteRandomWordsMaxCount);
2913 Serial.print(" frame_bytes=");
2914 Serial.println(kSlmpRequestHeaderSize + 2U + (kTxLimitWriteRandomWordsMaxCount * 8U));
2915 Serial.print("writeRandomBits max_devices=");
2916 Serial.print(kTxLimitWriteRandomBitsMaxCount);
2917 Serial.print(" frame_bytes=");
2918 Serial.println(kSlmpRequestHeaderSize + 1U + (kTxLimitWriteRandomBitsMaxCount * 8U));
2919 Serial.print("writeBlock words-only max_points=");
2920 Serial.print(kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints);
2921 Serial.print(" frame_bytes=");
2922 Serial.println(kSlmpRequestHeaderSize + 10U + (kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints * 2U));
2923 Serial.println("note: library uses the same tx_buffer for payload and full request frame");
2924}
2925
2926bool runTxlimitProbeWriteWords() {
2927 fillTxlimitWords(txlimit_word_values, kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount, 1000U);
2928 if (plc.writeWords(kTxLimitWordDevice, txlimit_word_values, kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2929 printLastPlcError("txlimit writeWords exact");
2930 return false;
2931 }
2932 if (plc.readWords(
2933 kTxLimitWordDevice,
2934 static_cast<uint16_t>(kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount),
2935 txlimit_word_readback,
2936 kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2937 printLastPlcError("txlimit readWords exact");
2938 return false;
2939 }
2940 if (!wordArraysEqual(txlimit_word_values, txlimit_word_readback, static_cast<uint16_t>(kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount))) {
2941 Serial.println("txlimit writeWords exact failed: readback mismatch");
2942 return false;
2943 }
2944 Serial.print("txlimit writeWords exact_fit=ok count=");
2945 Serial.print(kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount);
2946 Serial.print(" request_bytes=");
2947 Serial.println(plc.lastRequestFrameLength());
2948 clearWordRangeSilently(kTxLimitWordDevice, kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount);
2949
2950 fillTxlimitWords(txlimit_word_values, kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount + 1U, 2000U);
2951 const slmp::Error error = plc.writeWords(kTxLimitWordDevice, txlimit_word_values, kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount + 1U);
2952 Serial.print("txlimit writeWords one_over=");
2953 Serial.println(slmp::errorString(error));
2954 return error == slmp::Error::BufferTooSmall;
2955}
2956
2957bool runTxlimitProbeWordBlock() {
2958 fillTxlimitWords(txlimit_block_values, kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints, 3000U);
2959 const slmp::DeviceBlockWrite exact_block = {
2960 kTxLimitBlockWordDevice,
2961 txlimit_block_values,
2962 static_cast<uint16_t>(kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints)
2963 };
2964 const slmp::DeviceBlockRead exact_read_block = {
2965 kTxLimitBlockWordDevice,
2966 static_cast<uint16_t>(kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints)
2967 };
2968 if (plc.writeBlock(&exact_block, 1, nullptr, 0) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2969 printLastPlcError("txlimit writeBlock exact");
2970 return false;
2971 }
2972 if (plc.readBlock(
2973 &exact_read_block,
2974 1,
2975 nullptr,
2976 0,
2977 txlimit_block_readback,
2978 kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints,
2979 nullptr,
2980 0) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
2981 printLastPlcError("txlimit readBlock exact");
2982 return false;
2983 }
2984 if (!wordArraysEqual(txlimit_block_values, txlimit_block_readback, static_cast<uint16_t>(kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints))) {
2985 Serial.println("txlimit writeBlock exact failed: readback mismatch");
2986 return false;
2987 }
2988 Serial.print("txlimit writeBlock words exact_fit=ok points=");
2989 Serial.print(kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints);
2990 Serial.print(" request_bytes=");
2991 Serial.println(plc.lastRequestFrameLength());
2992 clearWordRangeSilently(kTxLimitBlockWordDevice, kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints);
2993
2994 fillTxlimitWords(txlimit_block_values, kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints + 1U, 4000U);
2995 const slmp::DeviceBlockWrite over_block = {
2996 kTxLimitBlockWordDevice,
2997 txlimit_block_values,
2998 static_cast<uint16_t>(kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints + 1U)
2999 };
3000 const slmp::Error error = plc.writeBlock(&over_block, 1, nullptr, 0);
3001 Serial.print("txlimit writeBlock words one_over=");
3002 Serial.println(slmp::errorString(error));
3003 return error == slmp::Error::BufferTooSmall;
3004}
3005
3006void runTxlimitProbe() {
3007 stopEndurance(false, false);
3008 stopReconnect(false);
3009 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3010 Serial.println("txlimit probe failed: plc not connected");
3011 return;
3012 }
3013 printEvidenceHeader();
3014 printTxlimitSummary();
3015 const bool write_words_ok = runTxlimitProbeWriteWords();
3016 const bool block_ok = runTxlimitProbeWordBlock();
3017 Serial.print("txlimit probe summary: writeWords=");
3018 Serial.print(write_words_ok ? "ok" : "fail");
3019 Serial.print(" writeBlockWords=");
3020 Serial.println(block_ok ? "ok" : "fail");
3021}
3022
3023bool runTxlimitBinarySearchWriteWords() {
3024 fillTxlimitWords(txlimit_word_values, kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount + 1U, 1000U);
3025 uint16_t low = 1;
3026 uint16_t high = static_cast<uint16_t>(kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount + 1U);
3027 uint16_t best_ok = 0;
3028 uint16_t first_fail = 0;
3029 size_t last_request_bytes = 0;
3030 slmp::Error last_error = slmp::Error::Ok;
3031 bool found_fail = false;
3032 bool aborted = false;
3033 uint16_t attempts = 0;
3034
3035 while (low < high) {
3036 const uint16_t mid = static_cast<uint16_t>(low + (high - low) / 2U);
3037 ++attempts;
3038 const slmp::Error error = plc.writeWords(kTxLimitWordDevice, txlimit_word_values, mid);
3039 last_request_bytes = plc.lastRequestFrameLength();
3040 if (error == slmp::Error::Ok) {
3041 best_ok = mid;
3042 low = static_cast<uint16_t>(mid + 1U);
3043 continue;
3044 }
3045 found_fail = true;
3046 first_fail = mid;
3047 last_error = error;
3048 if (error != slmp::Error::BufferTooSmall) {
3049 aborted = true;
3050 break;
3051 }
3052 high = mid;
3053 }
3054
3055 if (best_ok > 0) {
3056 clearWordRangeSilently(kTxLimitWordDevice, best_ok);
3057 }
3058 if (!found_fail) {
3059 first_fail = static_cast<uint16_t>(best_ok + 1U);
3060 }
3061
3062 Serial.print("txlimit binary words best=");
3063 Serial.print(best_ok);
3064 Serial.print(" first_fail=");
3065 Serial.print(first_fail);
3066 Serial.print(" attempts=");
3067 Serial.print(attempts);
3068 Serial.print(" error=");
3069 Serial.print(slmp::errorString(last_error));
3070 Serial.print(" request_bytes=");
3071 Serial.println(last_request_bytes);
3072 return !aborted && best_ok == kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount && last_error == slmp::Error::BufferTooSmall;
3073}
3074
3075bool runTxlimitBinarySearchWordBlock() {
3076 fillTxlimitWords(txlimit_block_values, kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints + 1U, 3000U);
3077 uint16_t low = 1;
3078 uint16_t high = static_cast<uint16_t>(kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints + 1U);
3079 uint16_t best_ok = 0;
3080 uint16_t first_fail = 0;
3081 size_t last_request_bytes = 0;
3082 slmp::Error last_error = slmp::Error::Ok;
3083 bool found_fail = false;
3084 bool aborted = false;
3085 uint16_t attempts = 0;
3086
3087 while (low < high) {
3088 const uint16_t mid = static_cast<uint16_t>(low + (high - low) / 2U);
3089 ++attempts;
3090 const slmp::DeviceBlockWrite block = {
3091 kTxLimitBlockWordDevice,
3092 txlimit_block_values,
3093 mid
3094 };
3095 const slmp::Error error = plc.writeBlock(&block, 1, nullptr, 0);
3096 last_request_bytes = plc.lastRequestFrameLength();
3097 if (error == slmp::Error::Ok) {
3098 best_ok = mid;
3099 low = static_cast<uint16_t>(mid + 1U);
3100 continue;
3101 }
3102 found_fail = true;
3103 first_fail = mid;
3104 last_error = error;
3105 if (error != slmp::Error::BufferTooSmall) {
3106 aborted = true;
3107 break;
3108 }
3109 high = mid;
3110 }
3111
3112 if (best_ok > 0) {
3113 clearWordRangeSilently(kTxLimitBlockWordDevice, best_ok);
3114 }
3115 if (!found_fail) {
3116 first_fail = static_cast<uint16_t>(best_ok + 1U);
3117 }
3118
3119 Serial.print("txlimit binary block best=");
3120 Serial.print(best_ok);
3121 Serial.print(" first_fail=");
3122 Serial.print(first_fail);
3123 Serial.print(" attempts=");
3124 Serial.print(attempts);
3125 Serial.print(" error=");
3126 Serial.print(slmp::errorString(last_error));
3127 Serial.print(" request_bytes=");
3128 Serial.println(last_request_bytes);
3129 return !aborted && best_ok == kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints && last_error == slmp::Error::BufferTooSmall;
3130}
3131
3132void runTxlimitBinarySearch() {
3133 stopEndurance(false, false);
3134 stopReconnect(false);
3135 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3136 Serial.println("txlimit binary sweep failed: plc not connected");
3137 return;
3138 }
3139 printEvidenceHeader();
3140 printTxlimitSummary();
3141 const bool words_ok = runTxlimitBinarySearchWriteWords();
3142 const bool block_ok = runTxlimitBinarySearchWordBlock();
3143 Serial.print("txlimit binary sweep summary: words=");
3144 Serial.print(words_ok ? "ok" : "fail");
3145 Serial.print(" block=");
3146 Serial.println(block_ok ? "ok" : "fail");
3147}
3148
3149bool runTxlimitSweepWriteWords() {
3150 fillTxlimitWords(txlimit_word_values, kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount + 1U, 1000U);
3151 uint16_t last_ok_count = 0;
3152 size_t last_request_bytes = 0;
3153 slmp::Error last_error = slmp::Error::Ok;
3154
3155 for (uint16_t count = 1; count <= static_cast<uint16_t>(kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount + 1U); ++count) {
3156 const slmp::Error error = plc.writeWords(kTxLimitWordDevice, txlimit_word_values, count);
3157 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3158 last_error = error;
3159 break;
3160 }
3161 last_ok_count = count;
3162 last_request_bytes = plc.lastRequestFrameLength();
3163 }
3164
3165 if (last_ok_count > 0) {
3166 clearWordRangeSilently(kTxLimitWordDevice, last_ok_count);
3167 }
3168
3169 Serial.print("txlimit sweep words last_ok=");
3170 Serial.print(last_ok_count);
3171 Serial.print(" first_fail=");
3172 Serial.print(static_cast<uint32_t>(last_ok_count) + 1U);
3173 Serial.print(" error=");
3174 Serial.print(slmp::errorString(last_error));
3175 Serial.print(" request_bytes=");
3176 Serial.println(last_request_bytes);
3177 return last_ok_count == kTxLimitWriteWordsMaxCount && last_error == slmp::Error::BufferTooSmall;
3178}
3179
3180bool runTxlimitSweepWordBlock() {
3181 fillTxlimitWords(txlimit_block_values, kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints + 1U, 3000U);
3182 uint16_t last_ok_count = 0;
3183 size_t last_request_bytes = 0;
3184 slmp::Error last_error = slmp::Error::Ok;
3185
3186 for (uint16_t count = 1; count <= static_cast<uint16_t>(kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints + 1U); ++count) {
3187 const slmp::DeviceBlockWrite block = {
3188 kTxLimitBlockWordDevice,
3189 txlimit_block_values,
3190 count
3191 };
3192 const slmp::Error error = plc.writeBlock(&block, 1, nullptr, 0);
3193 if (error != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3194 last_error = error;
3195 break;
3196 }
3197 last_ok_count = count;
3198 last_request_bytes = plc.lastRequestFrameLength();
3199 }
3200
3201 if (last_ok_count > 0) {
3202 clearWordRangeSilently(kTxLimitBlockWordDevice, last_ok_count);
3203 }
3204
3205 Serial.print("txlimit sweep block last_ok=");
3206 Serial.print(last_ok_count);
3207 Serial.print(" first_fail=");
3208 Serial.print(static_cast<uint32_t>(last_ok_count) + 1U);
3209 Serial.print(" error=");
3210 Serial.print(slmp::errorString(last_error));
3211 Serial.print(" request_bytes=");
3212 Serial.println(last_request_bytes);
3213 return last_ok_count == kTxLimitWriteBlockWordMaxPoints && last_error == slmp::Error::BufferTooSmall;
3214}
3215
3216void runTxlimitSweep() {
3217 stopEndurance(false, false);
3218 stopReconnect(false);
3219 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3220 Serial.println("txlimit sweep failed: plc not connected");
3221 return;
3222 }
3223 printEvidenceHeader();
3224 printTxlimitSummary();
3225 const bool words_ok = runTxlimitSweepWriteWords();
3226 const bool block_ok = runTxlimitSweepWordBlock();
3227 Serial.print("txlimit sweep summary: words=");
3228 Serial.print(words_ok ? "ok" : "fail");
3229 Serial.print(" block=");
3230 Serial.println(block_ok ? "ok" : "fail");
3231}
3232
3233void txlimitCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
3234 if (token_count == 1) {
3235 printTxlimitSummary();
3236 return;
3237 }
3238
3239 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[1]);
3240 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "CALC") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "INFO") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "STATUS") == 0) {
3241 printTxlimitSummary();
3242 return;
3243 }
3244 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "PROBE") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "TEST") == 0) {
3245 runTxlimitProbe();
3246 return;
3247 }
3248 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "SWEEP") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "RAMP") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "SCAN") == 0) {
3249 if (token_count == 2) {
3250 runTxlimitSweep();
3251 return;
3252 }
3253 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[2]);
3254 if (strcmp(tokens[2], "ALL") == 0) {
3255 runTxlimitSweep();
3256 return;
3257 }
3258 if (strcmp(tokens[2], "BINARY") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[2], "BIN") == 0) {
3259 if (token_count == 3) {
3260 runTxlimitBinarySearch();
3261 return;
3262 }
3263 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[3]);
3264 if (strcmp(tokens[3], "ALL") == 0) {
3265 runTxlimitBinarySearch();
3266 return;
3267 }
3268 if (strcmp(tokens[3], "WORDS") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[3], "WORD") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[3], "WRITEWORDS") == 0) {
3269 stopEndurance(false, false);
3270 stopReconnect(false);
3271 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3272 Serial.println("txlimit binary sweep words failed: plc not connected");
3273 return;
3274 }
3275 printTxlimitSummary();
3276 const bool ok = runTxlimitBinarySearchWriteWords();
3277 Serial.print("txlimit binary sweep words result=");
3278 Serial.println(ok ? "ok" : "fail");
3279 return;
3280 }
3281 if (strcmp(tokens[3], "BLOCK") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[3], "WRITEBLOCK") == 0) {
3282 stopEndurance(false, false);
3283 stopReconnect(false);
3284 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3285 Serial.println("txlimit binary sweep block failed: plc not connected");
3286 return;
3287 }
3288 printTxlimitSummary();
3289 const bool ok = runTxlimitBinarySearchWordBlock();
3290 Serial.print("txlimit binary sweep block result=");
3291 Serial.println(ok ? "ok" : "fail");
3292 return;
3293 }
3294 Serial.println("txlimit sweep binary usage: txlimit sweep binary [all|words|block]");
3295 return;
3296 }
3297 if (strcmp(tokens[2], "WORDS") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[2], "WORD") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[2], "WRITEWORDS") == 0) {
3298 stopEndurance(false, false);
3299 stopReconnect(false);
3300 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3301 Serial.println("txlimit sweep words failed: plc not connected");
3302 return;
3303 }
3304 printTxlimitSummary();
3305 const bool ok = runTxlimitSweepWriteWords();
3306 Serial.print("txlimit sweep words result=");
3307 Serial.println(ok ? "ok" : "fail");
3308 return;
3309 }
3310 if (strcmp(tokens[2], "BLOCK") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[2], "WRITEBLOCK") == 0) {
3311 stopEndurance(false, false);
3312 stopReconnect(false);
3313 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3314 Serial.println("txlimit sweep block failed: plc not connected");
3315 return;
3316 }
3317 printTxlimitSummary();
3318 const bool ok = runTxlimitSweepWordBlock();
3319 Serial.print("txlimit sweep block result=");
3320 Serial.println(ok ? "ok" : "fail");
3321 return;
3322 }
3323 }
3324
3325 Serial.println("txlimit usage: txlimit [calc|probe|sweep]");
3326 Serial.println(" txlimit sweep [all|words|block]");
3327 Serial.println(" txlimit sweep binary [all|words|block]");
3328}
3329
3330void printHelp() {
3331 Serial.println("commands:");
3332 Serial.println(" help");
3333 Serial.println(" status");
3334 Serial.println(" connect | close | reinit | type | dump");
3335 Serial.println(" transport [tcp|udp|list]");
3336 Serial.println(" frame [3e|4e|list]");
3337 Serial.println(" compat [iqr|legacy|list]");
3338 Serial.println(" port <number>");
3339 Serial.println(" target [network station module_io multidrop]");
3340 Serial.println(" monitor [value]");
3341 Serial.println(" timeout <ms>");
3342 Serial.println(" funcheck [all|direct|api]");
3343 Serial.println(" fullscan");
3344 Serial.println(" endurance [start [cycles]|status|stop|list]");
3345
3346 Serial.println(" reconnect [start [cycles]|status|stop|list]");
3347 Serial.println(" txlimit [calc|probe|sweep]");
3348 Serial.println(" txlimit sweep [all|words|block]");
3349 Serial.println(" txlimit sweep binary [all|words|block]");
3350 Serial.println(" bench [row|wow|pair|rw|ww|block] [cycles]");
3351 Serial.println(" bench list");
3352 Serial.println(" rw <device> [points]");
3353 Serial.println(" ww <device> <value...>");
3354 Serial.println(" row <device>");
3355 Serial.println(" wow <device> <value>");
3356 Serial.println(" rb <device>");
3357 Serial.println(" wb <device> <0|1>");
3358 Serial.println(" rbits <device> <points>");
3359 Serial.println(" wbits <device> <0|1...>");
3360 Serial.println(" rdw <device> [points]");
3361 Serial.println(" wdw <device> <value...>");
3362 Serial.println(" rod <device>");
3363 Serial.println(" wod <device> <value>");
3364 Serial.println(" rr <word_count> <word_devices...> <dword_count> <dword_devices...>");
3365 Serial.println(" wrand <word_count> <device value...> <dword_count> <device value...>");
3366 Serial.println(" wrandb <count> <device value...>");
3367 Serial.println(" rblk <word_blocks> <device points...> <bit_blocks> <device points...>");
3368 Serial.println(" wblk <word_blocks> <device points values...> <bit_blocks> <device points packed...>");
3369 Serial.println(" unlock <password>");
3370 Serial.println(" lock <password>");
3371 Serial.println(" verifyw <device> <value...>");
3372 Serial.println(" verifyb <device> <0|1>");
3373 Serial.println(" pending | judge <ok|ng> [note]");
3374 Serial.println("examples:");
3375 Serial.println(" target 0 255 0x03FF 0");
3376 Serial.println(" row D100");
3377 Serial.println(" rdw D200 2");
3378 Serial.println(" rbits M100 4");
3379 Serial.println(" rr 2 D100 D101 1 D200");
3380 Serial.println(" wrand 1 D120 123 1 D200 0x12345678");
3381 Serial.println(" rblk 1 D300 2 1 M200 1");
3382 Serial.println(" wblk 1 D300 2 10 20 1 M200 1 0x0005");
3383 Serial.println(" funcheck");
3384 Serial.println(" endurance 1000");
3385 Serial.println(" reconnect");
3386 Serial.println(" txlimit probe");
3387 Serial.println(" txlimit sweep all");
3388 Serial.println(" bench");
3389 Serial.println(" bench row 1000");
3390 Serial.println(" bench block 300");
3391 Serial.println(" transport udp");
3392 Serial.println(" frame 3e");
3393 Serial.println("hex-address devices: X, Y, B, W, SB, SW, DX, DY");
3394 Serial.println("bit block points use packed 16-bit words");
3395}
3396
3397void printTransportList() {
3398 Serial.println("transport modes:");
3399 Serial.println(" transport tcp");
3400#if SLMP_ENABLE_UDP_TRANSPORT
3401 Serial.println(" transport udp");
3402#else
3403 Serial.println(" transport udp (not compiled)");
3404#endif
3405}
3406
3407void printFrameList() {
3408 Serial.println("frame modes:");
3409 Serial.println(" frame 4e");
3410 Serial.println(" frame 3e");
3411}
3412
3413void transportCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
3414 if (token_count == 1) {
3415 Serial.print("transport=");
3416 Serial.println(transportModeText(console_link.transport_mode));
3417 return;
3418 }
3419
3420 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[1]);
3421 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "LIST") == 0) {
3422 printTransportList();
3423 return;
3424 }
3425 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "TCP") == 0) {
3426 setTransportMode(TransportMode::Tcp, true);
3427 return;
3428 }
3429 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "UDP") == 0) {
3430#if SLMP_ENABLE_UDP_TRANSPORT
3431 setTransportMode(TransportMode::Udp, true);
3432#else
3433 Serial.println("transport udp is not available in this build");
3434#endif
3435 return;
3436 }
3437
3438 Serial.println("transport usage: transport [tcp|udp|list]");
3439}
3440
3441void frameCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
3442 if (token_count == 1) {
3443 Serial.print("frame=");
3444 Serial.println(frameTypeText(console_link.frame_type));
3445 return;
3446 }
3447
3448 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[1]);
3449 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "LIST") == 0) {
3450 printFrameList();
3451 return;
3452 }
3453 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "3E") == 0) {
3454 setFrameTypeMode(slmp::FrameType::Frame3E);
3455 return;
3456 }
3457 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "4E") == 0) {
3458 setFrameTypeMode(slmp::FrameType::Frame4E);
3459 return;
3460 }
3461
3462 Serial.println("frame usage: frame [3e|4e|list]");
3463}
3464
3465void portCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
3466 if (token_count == 1) {
3467 Serial.print("plc_port=");
3468 Serial.println(console_link.plc_port);
3469 return;
3470 }
3471
3472 unsigned long parsed_port = 0;
3473 if (!parseUnsignedValue(tokens[1], parsed_port, 10) || parsed_port == 0 || parsed_port > 65535UL) {
3474 Serial.println("port usage: port <1..65535>");
3475 return;
3476 }
3477
3478 const uint16_t new_port = static_cast<uint16_t>(parsed_port);
3479 if (console_link.plc_port == new_port) {
3480 Serial.print("plc_port=");
3481 Serial.println(console_link.plc_port);
3482 return;
3483 }
3484
3485 const bool was_connected = plc.connected();
3486 if (was_connected) {
3487 plc.close();
3488 }
3489
3490 console_link.plc_port = new_port;
3491 Serial.print("plc_port=");
3492 Serial.println(console_link.plc_port);
3493
3494 if (was_connected) {
3495 (void)connectPlc(true);
3496 }
3497}
3498
3499void printTypeName() {
3500 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3501 Serial.println("type failed: plc not connected");
3502 return;
3503 }
3504
3505 slmp::TypeNameInfo type_name = {};
3506 if (plc.readTypeName(type_name) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3507 printLastPlcError("readTypeName");
3508 return;
3509 }
3510
3511 Serial.print("model=");
3512 Serial.print(type_name.model);
3513 if (type_name.has_model_code) {
3514 Serial.print(" code=0x");
3515 Serial.println(type_name.model_code, HEX);
3516 } else {
3517 Serial.println();
3518 }
3519}
3520
3521void readWordsCommand(char* device_token, char* points_token) {
3522 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3523 if (!parseDeviceAddress(device_token, device)) {
3524 Serial.println("rw usage: rw <device> [points]");
3525 return;
3526 }
3527
3528 uint16_t points = 1;
3529 if (points_token != nullptr && !parsePointCount(points_token, points)) {
3530 Serial.println("rw points must be 1..8");
3531 return;
3532 }
3533
3534 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3535 Serial.println("rw failed: plc not connected");
3536 return;
3537 }
3538
3539 uint16_t values[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
3540 if (plc.readWords(device, points, values, kMaxWordPoints) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3541 printLastPlcError("readWords");
3542 return;
3543 }
3544
3545 for (uint16_t i = 0; i < points; ++i) {
3546 printDeviceAddress(device, i);
3547 Serial.print("=");
3548 Serial.print(values[i]);
3549 Serial.print(" (0x");
3550 Serial.print(values[i], HEX);
3551 Serial.println(")");
3552 }
3553}
3554
3555void writeWordsCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
3556 if (token_count < 3) {
3557 Serial.println("ww usage: ww <device> <value...>");
3558 return;
3559 }
3560
3561 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3562 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[1], device)) {
3563 Serial.println("ww device parse failed");
3564 return;
3565 }
3566
3567 const int value_count = token_count - 2;
3568 if (value_count <= 0 || value_count > static_cast<int>(kMaxWordPoints)) {
3569 Serial.println("ww accepts 1..8 values");
3570 return;
3571 }
3572
3573 uint16_t values[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
3574 for (int i = 0; i < value_count; ++i) {
3575 if (!parseWordValue(tokens[i + 2], values[i])) {
3576 Serial.println("ww values must fit in 16 bits");
3577 return;
3578 }
3579 }
3580
3581 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3582 Serial.println("ww failed: plc not connected");
3583 return;
3584 }
3585
3586 if (plc.writeWords(device, values, static_cast<size_t>(value_count)) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3587 printLastPlcError("writeWords");
3588 return;
3589 }
3590
3591 Serial.println("writeWords ok");
3592}
3593
3594void verifyWordsCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
3595 if (token_count < 3) {
3596 Serial.println("verifyw usage: verifyw <device> <value...>");
3597 return;
3598 }
3599
3600 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3601 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[1], device)) {
3602 Serial.println("verifyw device parse failed");
3603 return;
3604 }
3605
3606 const int value_count = token_count - 2;
3607 if (value_count <= 0 || value_count > static_cast<int>(kMaxWordPoints)) {
3608 Serial.println("verifyw accepts 1..8 values");
3609 return;
3610 }
3611
3612 uint16_t values[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
3613 for (int i = 0; i < value_count; ++i) {
3614 if (!parseWordValue(tokens[i + 2], values[i])) {
3615 Serial.println("verifyw values must fit in 16 bits");
3616 return;
3617 }
3618 }
3619
3620 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3621 Serial.println("verifyw failed: plc not connected");
3622 return;
3623 }
3624
3625 uint16_t before[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
3626 if (plc.readWords(device, static_cast<uint16_t>(value_count), before, kMaxWordPoints) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3627 printLastPlcError("verifyw before read");
3628 return;
3629 }
3630
3631 if (plc.writeWords(device, values, static_cast<size_t>(value_count)) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3632 printLastPlcError("verifyw write");
3633 return;
3634 }
3635
3636 uint16_t readback[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
3637 if (plc.readWords(device, static_cast<uint16_t>(value_count), readback, kMaxWordPoints) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3638 printLastPlcError("verifyw readback");
3639 return;
3640 }
3641
3642 resetVerificationRecord();
3643 verification.active = true;
3644 verification.kind = VerificationKind::WordWrite;
3645 verification.device = device;
3646 verification.points = static_cast<uint16_t>(value_count);
3647 verification.started_ms = millis();
3648 memcpy(verification.before_words, before, sizeof(uint16_t) * static_cast<size_t>(value_count));
3649 memcpy(verification.written_words, values, sizeof(uint16_t) * static_cast<size_t>(value_count));
3650 memcpy(verification.readback_words, readback, sizeof(uint16_t) * static_cast<size_t>(value_count));
3651 verification.readback_match = wordArraysEqual(values, readback, static_cast<uint16_t>(value_count));
3652
3653 printVerificationSummary();
3654}
3655
3656void readBitCommand(char* device_token) {
3657 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3658 if (!parseDeviceAddress(device_token, device)) {
3659 Serial.println("rb usage: rb <device>");
3660 return;
3661 }
3662
3663 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3664 Serial.println("rb failed: plc not connected");
3665 return;
3666 }
3667
3668 bool value = false;
3669 if (plc.readOneBit(device, value) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3670 printLastPlcError("readOneBit");
3671 return;
3672 }
3673
3674 printDeviceAddress(device);
3675 Serial.print("=");
3676 Serial.println(value ? 1 : 0);
3677}
3678
3679void writeBitCommand(char* device_token, char* value_token) {
3680 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3681 if (!parseDeviceAddress(device_token, device)) {
3682 Serial.println("wb usage: wb <device> <0|1>");
3683 return;
3684 }
3685
3686 bool value = false;
3687 if (!parseBoolValue(value_token, value)) {
3688 Serial.println("wb value must be 0/1, on/off, or true/false");
3689 return;
3690 }
3691
3692 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3693 Serial.println("wb failed: plc not connected");
3694 return;
3695 }
3696
3697 if (plc.writeOneBit(device, value) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3698 printLastPlcError("writeOneBit");
3699 return;
3700 }
3701
3702 Serial.println("writeOneBit ok");
3703}
3704
3705void verifyBitCommand(char* device_token, char* value_token) {
3706 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3707 if (!parseDeviceAddress(device_token, device)) {
3708 Serial.println("verifyb usage: verifyb <device> <0|1>");
3709 return;
3710 }
3711
3712 bool value = false;
3713 if (!parseBoolValue(value_token, value)) {
3714 Serial.println("verifyb value must be 0/1, on/off, or true/false");
3715 return;
3716 }
3717
3718 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3719 Serial.println("verifyb failed: plc not connected");
3720 return;
3721 }
3722
3723 bool before = false;
3724 if (plc.readOneBit(device, before) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3725 printLastPlcError("verifyb before read");
3726 return;
3727 }
3728
3729 if (plc.writeOneBit(device, value) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3730 printLastPlcError("verifyb write");
3731 return;
3732 }
3733
3734 bool readback = false;
3735 if (plc.readOneBit(device, readback) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3736 printLastPlcError("verifyb readback");
3737 return;
3738 }
3739
3740 resetVerificationRecord();
3741 verification.active = true;
3742 verification.kind = VerificationKind::BitWrite;
3743 verification.device = device;
3744 verification.points = 1;
3745 verification.started_ms = millis();
3746 verification.before_bit = before;
3747 verification.written_bit = value;
3748 verification.readback_bit = readback;
3749 verification.readback_match = value == readback;
3750
3751 printVerificationSummary();
3752}
3753
3754bool parsePositiveCount(const char* token, uint16_t max_value, uint16_t& count) {
3755 unsigned long parsed = 0;
3756 if (!parseUnsignedValue(token, parsed, 10) || parsed == 0 || parsed > max_value) {
3757 return false;
3758 }
3759 count = static_cast<uint16_t>(parsed);
3760 return true;
3761}
3762
3763void targetCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
3764 if (token_count == 1) {
3765 printTargetAddress();
3766 return;
3767 }
3768 if (token_count != 5) {
3769 Serial.println("target usage: target <network> <station> <module_io> <multidrop>");
3770 return;
3771 }
3772
3773 uint8_t network = 0;
3774 uint8_t station = 0;
3775 uint8_t multidrop = 0;
3776 uint16_t module_io = 0;
3777 if (!parseByteValue(tokens[1], network) || !parseByteValue(tokens[2], station) ||
3778 !parseUint16Value(tokens[3], module_io) || !parseByteValue(tokens[4], multidrop)) {
3779 Serial.println("target values must fit network/station/multidrop=0..255 and module_io=0..65535");
3780 return;
3781 }
3782
3783 slmp::TargetAddress target = plc.target();
3784 target.network = network;
3785 target.station = station;
3786 target.module_io = module_io;
3787 target.multidrop = multidrop;
3788 plc.setTarget(target);
3789 printTargetAddress();
3790}
3791
3792void monitorCommand(char* value_token) {
3793 if (value_token == nullptr) {
3794 Serial.print("monitoring_timer=");
3795 Serial.println(plc.monitoringTimer());
3796 return;
3797 }
3798
3799 uint16_t monitoring_timer = 0;
3800 if (!parseUint16Value(value_token, monitoring_timer)) {
3801 Serial.println("monitor usage: monitor [value]");
3802 return;
3803 }
3804
3805 plc.setMonitoringTimer(monitoring_timer);
3806 Serial.print("monitoring_timer=");
3807 Serial.println(plc.monitoringTimer());
3808}
3809
3810void readOneWordCommand(char* device_token) {
3811 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3812 if (!parseDeviceAddress(device_token, device)) {
3813 Serial.println("row usage: row <device>");
3814 return;
3815 }
3816
3817 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3818 Serial.println("row failed: plc not connected");
3819 return;
3820 }
3821
3822 uint16_t value = 0;
3823 if (plc.readOneWord(device, value) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3824 printLastPlcError("readOneWord");
3825 return;
3826 }
3827
3828 printDeviceAddress(device);
3829 Serial.print("=");
3830 Serial.print(value);
3831 Serial.print(" (0x");
3832 Serial.print(value, HEX);
3833 Serial.println(")");
3834}
3835
3836void writeOneWordCommand(char* device_token, char* value_token) {
3837 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3838 if (!parseDeviceAddress(device_token, device)) {
3839 Serial.println("wow usage: wow <device> <value>");
3840 return;
3841 }
3842
3843 uint16_t value = 0;
3844 if (!parseWordValue(value_token, value)) {
3845 Serial.println("wow value must fit in 16 bits");
3846 return;
3847 }
3848
3849 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3850 Serial.println("wow failed: plc not connected");
3851 return;
3852 }
3853
3854 if (plc.writeOneWord(device, value) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3855 printLastPlcError("writeOneWord");
3856 return;
3857 }
3858
3859 Serial.println("writeOneWord ok");
3860}
3861
3862void readBitsCommand(char* device_token, char* points_token) {
3863 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3864 if (!parseDeviceAddress(device_token, device)) {
3865 Serial.println("rbits usage: rbits <device> <points>");
3866 return;
3867 }
3868
3869 uint16_t points = 0;
3870 if (!parsePositiveCount(points_token, kMaxWordPoints, points)) {
3871 Serial.println("rbits points must be 1..8");
3872 return;
3873 }
3874
3875 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3876 Serial.println("rbits failed: plc not connected");
3877 return;
3878 }
3879
3880 bool values[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
3881 if (plc.readBits(device, points, values, kMaxWordPoints) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3882 printLastPlcError("readBits");
3883 return;
3884 }
3885
3886 for (uint16_t i = 0; i < points; ++i) {
3887 printDeviceAddress(device, i);
3888 Serial.print("=");
3889 Serial.println(values[i] ? 1 : 0);
3890 }
3891}
3892
3893void writeBitsCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
3894 if (token_count < 3) {
3895 Serial.println("wbits usage: wbits <device> <0|1...>");
3896 return;
3897 }
3898
3899 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3900 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[1], device)) {
3901 Serial.println("wbits device parse failed");
3902 return;
3903 }
3904
3905 const int value_count = token_count - 2;
3906 if (value_count <= 0 || value_count > static_cast<int>(kMaxWordPoints)) {
3907 Serial.println("wbits accepts 1..8 values");
3908 return;
3909 }
3910
3911 bool values[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
3912 for (int i = 0; i < value_count; ++i) {
3913 if (!parseBoolValue(tokens[i + 2], values[i])) {
3914 Serial.println("wbits values must be 0/1, on/off, or true/false");
3915 return;
3916 }
3917 }
3918
3919 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3920 Serial.println("wbits failed: plc not connected");
3921 return;
3922 }
3923
3924 if (plc.writeBits(device, values, static_cast<size_t>(value_count)) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3925 printLastPlcError("writeBits");
3926 return;
3927 }
3928
3929 Serial.println("writeBits ok");
3930}
3931
3932void readDWordsCommand(char* device_token, char* points_token) {
3933 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3934 if (!parseDeviceAddress(device_token, device)) {
3935 Serial.println("rdw usage: rdw <device> [points]");
3936 return;
3937 }
3938
3939 uint16_t points = 1;
3940 if (points_token != nullptr && !parsePositiveCount(points_token, kMaxWordPoints, points)) {
3941 Serial.println("rdw points must be 1..8");
3942 return;
3943 }
3944
3945 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3946 Serial.println("rdw failed: plc not connected");
3947 return;
3948 }
3949
3950 uint32_t values[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
3951 if (plc.readDWords(device, points, values, kMaxWordPoints) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3952 printLastPlcError("readDWords");
3953 return;
3954 }
3955
3956 for (uint16_t i = 0; i < points; ++i) {
3957 printDeviceAddress(device, i * 2U);
3958 Serial.print("=");
3959 Serial.print(static_cast<unsigned long>(values[i]));
3960 Serial.print(" (0x");
3961 Serial.print(static_cast<unsigned long>(values[i]), HEX);
3962 Serial.println(")");
3963 }
3964}
3965
3966void writeDWordsCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
3967 if (token_count < 3) {
3968 Serial.println("wdw usage: wdw <device> <value...>");
3969 return;
3970 }
3971
3972 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
3973 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[1], device)) {
3974 Serial.println("wdw device parse failed");
3975 return;
3976 }
3977
3978 const int value_count = token_count - 2;
3979 if (value_count <= 0 || value_count > static_cast<int>(kMaxWordPoints)) {
3980 Serial.println("wdw accepts 1..8 values");
3981 return;
3982 }
3983
3984 uint32_t values[kMaxWordPoints] = {};
3985 for (int i = 0; i < value_count; ++i) {
3986 if (!parseDWordValue(tokens[i + 2], values[i])) {
3987 Serial.println("wdw values must fit in 32 bits");
3988 return;
3989 }
3990 }
3991
3992 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
3993 Serial.println("wdw failed: plc not connected");
3994 return;
3995 }
3996
3997 if (plc.writeDWords(device, values, static_cast<size_t>(value_count)) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
3998 printLastPlcError("writeDWords");
3999 return;
4000 }
4001
4002 Serial.println("writeDWords ok");
4003}
4004
4005void readOneDWordCommand(char* device_token) {
4006 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
4007 if (!parseDeviceAddress(device_token, device)) {
4008 Serial.println("rod usage: rod <device>");
4009 return;
4010 }
4011
4012 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
4013 Serial.println("rod failed: plc not connected");
4014 return;
4015 }
4016
4017 uint32_t value = 0;
4018 if (plc.readOneDWord(device, value) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
4019 printLastPlcError("readOneDWord");
4020 return;
4021 }
4022
4023 printDeviceAddress(device);
4024 Serial.print("=");
4025 Serial.print(static_cast<unsigned long>(value));
4026 Serial.print(" (0x");
4027 Serial.print(static_cast<unsigned long>(value), HEX);
4028 Serial.println(")");
4029}
4030
4031void writeOneDWordCommand(char* device_token, char* value_token) {
4032 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
4033 if (!parseDeviceAddress(device_token, device)) {
4034 Serial.println("wod usage: wod <device> <value>");
4035 return;
4036 }
4037
4038 uint32_t value = 0;
4039 if (!parseDWordValue(value_token, value)) {
4040 Serial.println("wod value must fit in 32 bits");
4041 return;
4042 }
4043
4044 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
4045 Serial.println("wod failed: plc not connected");
4046 return;
4047 }
4048
4049 if (plc.writeOneDWord(device, value) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
4050 printLastPlcError("writeOneDWord");
4051 return;
4052 }
4053
4054 Serial.println("writeOneDWord ok");
4055}
4056
4057void readRandomCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
4058 if (token_count < 3) {
4059 Serial.println("rr usage: rr <word_count> <word_devices...> <dword_count> <dword_devices...>");
4060 return;
4061 }
4062
4063 int index = 1;
4064 uint8_t word_count = 0;
4065 if (!parseListCount(tokens[index++], kMaxRandomWordDevices, word_count)) {
4066 Serial.println("rr word_count must be 0..8");
4067 return;
4068 }
4069 if (token_count < index + word_count + 1) {
4070 Serial.println("rr usage: rr <word_count> <word_devices...> <dword_count> <dword_devices...>");
4071 return;
4072 }
4073
4074 slmp::DeviceAddress word_devices[kMaxRandomWordDevices] = {};
4075 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < word_count; ++i) {
4076 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[index++], word_devices[i])) {
4077 Serial.println("rr word device parse failed");
4078 return;
4079 }
4080 }
4081
4082 uint8_t dword_count = 0;
4083 if (!parseListCount(tokens[index++], kMaxRandomDWordDevices, dword_count)) {
4084 Serial.println("rr dword_count must be 0..8");
4085 return;
4086 }
4087 if (word_count == 0 && dword_count == 0) {
4088 Serial.println("rr requires at least one device");
4089 return;
4090 }
4091 if (token_count != index + dword_count) {
4092 Serial.println("rr usage: rr <word_count> <word_devices...> <dword_count> <dword_devices...>");
4093 return;
4094 }
4095
4096 slmp::DeviceAddress dword_devices[kMaxRandomDWordDevices] = {};
4097 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < dword_count; ++i) {
4098 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[index++], dword_devices[i])) {
4099 Serial.println("rr dword device parse failed");
4100 return;
4101 }
4102 }
4103
4104 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
4105 Serial.println("rr failed: plc not connected");
4106 return;
4107 }
4108
4109 uint16_t word_values[kMaxRandomWordDevices] = {};
4110 uint32_t dword_values[kMaxRandomDWordDevices] = {};
4111 if (plc.readRandom(
4112 word_devices,
4113 word_count,
4114 word_values,
4115 kMaxRandomWordDevices,
4116 dword_devices,
4117 dword_count,
4118 dword_values,
4119 kMaxRandomDWordDevices
4120 ) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
4121 printLastPlcError("readRandom");
4122 return;
4123 }
4124
4125 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < word_count; ++i) {
4126 printDeviceAddress(word_devices[i]);
4127 Serial.print("=");
4128 Serial.print(word_values[i]);
4129 Serial.print(" (0x");
4130 Serial.print(word_values[i], HEX);
4131 Serial.println(")");
4132 }
4133 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < dword_count; ++i) {
4134 printDeviceAddress(dword_devices[i]);
4135 Serial.print("=");
4136 Serial.print(static_cast<unsigned long>(dword_values[i]));
4137 Serial.print(" (0x");
4138 Serial.print(static_cast<unsigned long>(dword_values[i]), HEX);
4139 Serial.println(")");
4140 }
4141}
4142
4143void writeRandomWordsCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
4144 if (token_count < 3) {
4145 Serial.println("wrand usage: wrand <word_count> <device value...> <dword_count> <device value...>");
4146 return;
4147 }
4148
4149 int index = 1;
4150 uint8_t word_count = 0;
4151 if (!parseListCount(tokens[index++], kMaxRandomWordDevices, word_count)) {
4152 Serial.println("wrand word_count must be 0..8");
4153 return;
4154 }
4155 if (token_count < index + (word_count * 2) + 1) {
4156 Serial.println("wrand usage: wrand <word_count> <device value...> <dword_count> <device value...>");
4157 return;
4158 }
4159
4160 slmp::DeviceAddress word_devices[kMaxRandomWordDevices] = {};
4161 uint16_t word_values[kMaxRandomWordDevices] = {};
4162 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < word_count; ++i) {
4163 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[index++], word_devices[i])) {
4164 Serial.println("wrand word device parse failed");
4165 return;
4166 }
4167 if (!parseWordValue(tokens[index++], word_values[i])) {
4168 Serial.println("wrand word values must fit in 16 bits");
4169 return;
4170 }
4171 }
4172
4173 uint8_t dword_count = 0;
4174 if (!parseListCount(tokens[index++], kMaxRandomDWordDevices, dword_count)) {
4175 Serial.println("wrand dword_count must be 0..8");
4176 return;
4177 }
4178 if (word_count == 0 && dword_count == 0) {
4179 Serial.println("wrand requires at least one device");
4180 return;
4181 }
4182 if (token_count != index + (dword_count * 2)) {
4183 Serial.println("wrand usage: wrand <word_count> <device value...> <dword_count> <device value...>");
4184 return;
4185 }
4186
4187 slmp::DeviceAddress dword_devices[kMaxRandomDWordDevices] = {};
4188 uint32_t dword_values[kMaxRandomDWordDevices] = {};
4189 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < dword_count; ++i) {
4190 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[index++], dword_devices[i])) {
4191 Serial.println("wrand dword device parse failed");
4192 return;
4193 }
4194 if (!parseDWordValue(tokens[index++], dword_values[i])) {
4195 Serial.println("wrand dword values must fit in 32 bits");
4196 return;
4197 }
4198 }
4199
4200 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
4201 Serial.println("wrand failed: plc not connected");
4202 return;
4203 }
4204
4205 if (plc.writeRandomWords(
4206 word_devices,
4207 word_values,
4208 word_count,
4209 dword_devices,
4210 dword_values,
4211 dword_count
4212 ) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
4213 printLastPlcError("writeRandomWords");
4214 return;
4215 }
4216
4217 Serial.println("writeRandomWords ok");
4218}
4219
4220void writeRandomBitsCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
4221 if (token_count < 4) {
4222 Serial.println("wrandb usage: wrandb <count> <device value...>");
4223 return;
4224 }
4225
4226 int index = 1;
4227 uint8_t bit_count = 0;
4228 if (!parseListCount(tokens[index++], kMaxRandomBitDevices, bit_count) || bit_count == 0) {
4229 Serial.println("wrandb count must be 1..8");
4230 return;
4231 }
4232 if (token_count != index + (bit_count * 2)) {
4233 Serial.println("wrandb usage: wrandb <count> <device value...>");
4234 return;
4235 }
4236
4237 slmp::DeviceAddress bit_devices[kMaxRandomBitDevices] = {};
4238 bool bit_values[kMaxRandomBitDevices] = {};
4239 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < bit_count; ++i) {
4240 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[index++], bit_devices[i])) {
4241 Serial.println("wrandb device parse failed");
4242 return;
4243 }
4244 if (!parseBoolValue(tokens[index++], bit_values[i])) {
4245 Serial.println("wrandb values must be 0/1, on/off, or true/false");
4246 return;
4247 }
4248 }
4249
4250 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
4251 Serial.println("wrandb failed: plc not connected");
4252 return;
4253 }
4254
4255 if (plc.writeRandomBits(bit_devices, bit_values, bit_count) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
4256 printLastPlcError("writeRandomBits");
4257 return;
4258 }
4259
4260 Serial.println("writeRandomBits ok");
4261}
4262
4263void readBlockCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
4264 if (token_count < 3) {
4265 Serial.println("rblk usage: rblk <word_blocks> <device points...> <bit_blocks> <device points...>");
4266 return;
4267 }
4268
4269 int index = 1;
4270 uint8_t word_block_count = 0;
4271 if (!parseListCount(tokens[index++], kMaxBlockCount, word_block_count)) {
4272 Serial.println("rblk word_blocks must be 0..4");
4273 return;
4274 }
4275 if (token_count < index + (word_block_count * 2) + 1) {
4276 Serial.println("rblk usage: rblk <word_blocks> <device points...> <bit_blocks> <device points...>");
4277 return;
4278 }
4279
4280 slmp::DeviceBlockRead word_blocks[kMaxBlockCount] = {};
4281 uint16_t total_word_points = 0;
4282 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < word_block_count; ++i) {
4283 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
4284 uint16_t points = 0;
4285 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[index++], device)) {
4286 Serial.println("rblk word block device parse failed");
4287 return;
4288 }
4289 if (!parsePositiveCount(tokens[index++], kMaxBlockPoints, points) ||
4290 total_word_points + points > kMaxBlockPoints) {
4291 Serial.println("rblk word block points must keep total within 1..16");
4292 return;
4293 }
4294 word_blocks[i] = {device, points};
4295 total_word_points = static_cast<uint16_t>(total_word_points + points);
4296 }
4297
4298 uint8_t bit_block_count = 0;
4299 if (!parseListCount(tokens[index++], kMaxBlockCount, bit_block_count)) {
4300 Serial.println("rblk bit_blocks must be 0..4");
4301 return;
4302 }
4303 if (word_block_count == 0 && bit_block_count == 0) {
4304 Serial.println("rblk requires at least one block");
4305 return;
4306 }
4307 if (token_count != index + (bit_block_count * 2)) {
4308 Serial.println("rblk usage: rblk <word_blocks> <device points...> <bit_blocks> <device points...>");
4309 return;
4310 }
4311
4312 slmp::DeviceBlockRead bit_blocks[kMaxBlockCount] = {};
4313 uint16_t total_bit_points = 0;
4314 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < bit_block_count; ++i) {
4315 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
4316 uint16_t points = 0;
4317 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[index++], device)) {
4318 Serial.println("rblk bit block device parse failed");
4319 return;
4320 }
4321 if (!parsePositiveCount(tokens[index++], kMaxBlockPoints, points) ||
4322 total_bit_points + points > kMaxBlockPoints) {
4323 Serial.println("rblk bit block points must keep total within 1..16 packed words");
4324 return;
4325 }
4326 bit_blocks[i] = {device, points};
4327 total_bit_points = static_cast<uint16_t>(total_bit_points + points);
4328 }
4329
4330 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
4331 Serial.println("rblk failed: plc not connected");
4332 return;
4333 }
4334
4335 uint16_t word_values[kMaxBlockPoints] = {};
4336 uint16_t bit_values[kMaxBlockPoints] = {};
4337 if (plc.readBlock(
4338 word_blocks,
4339 word_block_count,
4340 bit_blocks,
4341 bit_block_count,
4342 word_values,
4343 kMaxBlockPoints,
4344 bit_values,
4345 kMaxBlockPoints
4346 ) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
4347 printLastPlcError("readBlock");
4348 return;
4349 }
4350
4351 uint16_t word_offset = 0;
4352 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < word_block_count; ++i) {
4353 for (uint16_t j = 0; j < word_blocks[i].points; ++j) {
4354 printDeviceAddress(word_blocks[i].device, j);
4355 Serial.print("=");
4356 Serial.print(word_values[word_offset + j]);
4357 Serial.print(" (0x");
4358 Serial.print(word_values[word_offset + j], HEX);
4359 Serial.println(")");
4360 }
4361 word_offset = static_cast<uint16_t>(word_offset + word_blocks[i].points);
4362 }
4363
4364 uint16_t bit_offset = 0;
4365 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < bit_block_count; ++i) {
4366 for (uint16_t j = 0; j < bit_blocks[i].points; ++j) {
4367 printDeviceAddress(bit_blocks[i].device, static_cast<uint32_t>(j) * 16U);
4368 Serial.print(" packed=0x");
4369 Serial.println(bit_values[bit_offset + j], HEX);
4370 }
4371 bit_offset = static_cast<uint16_t>(bit_offset + bit_blocks[i].points);
4372 }
4373}
4374
4375void writeBlockCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
4376 if (token_count < 4) {
4377 Serial.println("wblk usage: wblk <word_blocks> <device points values...> <bit_blocks> <device points packed...>");
4378 return;
4379 }
4380
4381 int index = 1;
4382 uint8_t word_block_count = 0;
4383 if (!parseListCount(tokens[index++], kMaxBlockCount, word_block_count)) {
4384 Serial.println("wblk word_blocks must be 0..4");
4385 return;
4386 }
4387
4388 slmp::DeviceBlockWrite word_blocks[kMaxBlockCount] = {};
4389 uint16_t word_storage[kMaxBlockPoints] = {};
4390 uint16_t word_offset = 0;
4391 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < word_block_count; ++i) {
4392 if (token_count <= index + 1) {
4393 Serial.println("wblk word block definition incomplete");
4394 return;
4395 }
4396 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
4397 uint16_t points = 0;
4398 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[index++], device)) {
4399 Serial.println("wblk word block device parse failed");
4400 return;
4401 }
4402 if (!parsePositiveCount(tokens[index++], kMaxBlockPoints, points) || word_offset + points > kMaxBlockPoints) {
4403 Serial.println("wblk word block points must keep total within 1..16");
4404 return;
4405 }
4406 if (token_count < index + points) {
4407 Serial.println("wblk word block values missing");
4408 return;
4409 }
4410 word_blocks[i].device = device;
4411 word_blocks[i].values = word_storage + word_offset;
4412 word_blocks[i].points = points;
4413 for (uint16_t j = 0; j < points; ++j) {
4414 if (!parseWordValue(tokens[index++], word_storage[word_offset + j])) {
4415 Serial.println("wblk word values must fit in 16 bits");
4416 return;
4417 }
4418 }
4419 word_offset = static_cast<uint16_t>(word_offset + points);
4420 }
4421
4422 if (token_count <= index) {
4423 Serial.println("wblk bit block count missing");
4424 return;
4425 }
4426 uint8_t bit_block_count = 0;
4427 if (!parseListCount(tokens[index++], kMaxBlockCount, bit_block_count)) {
4428 Serial.println("wblk bit_blocks must be 0..4");
4429 return;
4430 }
4431 if (word_block_count == 0 && bit_block_count == 0) {
4432 Serial.println("wblk requires at least one block");
4433 return;
4434 }
4435
4436 slmp::DeviceBlockWrite bit_blocks[kMaxBlockCount] = {};
4437 uint16_t bit_storage[kMaxBlockPoints] = {};
4438 uint16_t bit_offset = 0;
4439 for (uint8_t i = 0; i < bit_block_count; ++i) {
4440 if (token_count <= index + 1) {
4441 Serial.println("wblk bit block definition incomplete");
4442 return;
4443 }
4444 slmp::DeviceAddress device = {};
4445 uint16_t points = 0;
4446 if (!parseDeviceAddress(tokens[index++], device)) {
4447 Serial.println("wblk bit block device parse failed");
4448 return;
4449 }
4450 if (!parsePositiveCount(tokens[index++], kMaxBlockPoints, points) || bit_offset + points > kMaxBlockPoints) {
4451 Serial.println("wblk bit block points must keep total within 1..16 packed words");
4452 return;
4453 }
4454 if (token_count < index + points) {
4455 Serial.println("wblk bit block packed values missing");
4456 return;
4457 }
4458 bit_blocks[i].device = device;
4459 bit_blocks[i].values = bit_storage + bit_offset;
4460 bit_blocks[i].points = points;
4461 for (uint16_t j = 0; j < points; ++j) {
4462 if (!parseWordValue(tokens[index++], bit_storage[bit_offset + j])) {
4463 Serial.println("wblk packed bit values must fit in 16 bits");
4464 return;
4465 }
4466 }
4467 bit_offset = static_cast<uint16_t>(bit_offset + points);
4468 }
4469
4470 if (token_count != index) {
4471 Serial.println("wblk usage: wblk <word_blocks> <device points values...> <bit_blocks> <device points packed...>");
4472 return;
4473 }
4474
4475 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
4476 Serial.println("wblk failed: plc not connected");
4477 return;
4478 }
4479
4480 if (plc.writeBlock(word_blocks, word_block_count, bit_blocks, bit_block_count) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
4481 printLastPlcError("writeBlock");
4482 return;
4483 }
4484
4485 Serial.println("writeBlock ok");
4486}
4487
4488void remotePasswordUnlockCommand(char* password_token) {
4489 if (password_token == nullptr) {
4490 Serial.println("unlock usage: unlock <password>");
4491 return;
4492 }
4493
4494 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
4495 Serial.println("unlock failed: plc not connected");
4496 return;
4497 }
4498
4499 if (plc.remotePasswordUnlock(password_token) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
4500 printLastPlcError("remotePasswordUnlock");
4501 return;
4502 }
4503
4504 Serial.println("remotePasswordUnlock ok");
4505}
4506
4507void remotePasswordLockCommand(char* password_token) {
4508 if (password_token == nullptr) {
4509 Serial.println("lock usage: lock <password>");
4510 return;
4511 }
4512
4513 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
4514 Serial.println("lock failed: plc not connected");
4515 return;
4516 }
4517
4518 if (plc.remotePasswordLock(password_token) != slmp::Error::Ok) {
4519 printLastPlcError("remotePasswordLock");
4520 return;
4521 }
4522
4523 Serial.println("remotePasswordLock ok");
4524}
4525
4526void judgeCommand(char* tokens[], int token_count) {
4527 if (!verification.active) {
4528 Serial.println("judge failed: no active verification");
4529 return;
4530 }
4531
4532 if (token_count < 2 || tokens[1] == nullptr) {
4533 Serial.println("judge usage: judge <ok|ng> [note]");
4534 return;
4535 }
4536
4537 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[1]);
4538 if (strcmp(tokens[1], "OK") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "PASS") == 0) {
4539 verification.pass = true;
4540 } else if (strcmp(tokens[1], "NG") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[1], "FAIL") == 0) {
4541 verification.pass = false;
4542 } else {
4543 Serial.println("judge usage: judge <ok|ng> [note]");
4544 return;
4545 }
4546
4547 verification.judged = true;
4548 joinTokens(tokens, 2, token_count, verification.note, sizeof(verification.note));
4549 printVerificationSummary();
4550}
4551
4552void setTimeoutCommand(char* value_token) {
4553 unsigned long timeout_ms = 0;
4554 if (!parseUnsignedValue(value_token, timeout_ms, 10)) {
4555 Serial.println("timeout usage: timeout <ms>");
4556 return;
4557 }
4558
4559 plc.setTimeoutMs(static_cast<uint32_t>(timeout_ms));
4560 Serial.print("timeout_ms=");
4561 Serial.println(plc.timeoutMs());
4562}
4563
4564int splitTokens(char* line, char* tokens[], int token_capacity) {
4565 int count = 0;
4566 char* cursor = line;
4567 while (*cursor != '\0' && count < token_capacity) {
4568 while (*cursor != '\0' && isspace(static_cast<unsigned char>(*cursor)) != 0) {
4569 ++cursor;
4570 }
4571 if (*cursor == '\0') {
4572 break;
4573 }
4574 tokens[count++] = cursor;
4575 while (*cursor != '\0' && isspace(static_cast<unsigned char>(*cursor)) == 0) {
4576 ++cursor;
4577 }
4578 if (*cursor == '\0') {
4579 break;
4580 }
4581 *cursor++ = '\0';
4582 }
4583 return count;
4584}
4585
4586void handleCommand(char* line) {
4587 char* tokens[kMaxTokens] = {};
4588 const int token_count = splitTokens(line, tokens, static_cast<int>(kMaxTokens));
4589 if (token_count == 0) {
4590 printPrompt();
4591 return;
4592 }
4593
4594 uppercaseInPlace(tokens[0]);
4595
4596 if (strcmp(tokens[0], "HELP") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "?") == 0) {
4597 printHelp();
4598 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "STATUS") == 0) {
4599 printStatus();
4600 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "CONNECT") == 0) {
4601 (void)connectPlc(true);
4602 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "CLOSE") == 0) {
4603 closePlc();
4604 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "REINIT") == 0) {
4605 reinitializeEthernet();
4606 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "TYPE") == 0) {
4607 printTypeName();
4608 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "TRANSPORT") == 0) {
4609 transportCommand(tokens, token_count);
4610 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "FRAME") == 0) {
4611 frameCommand(tokens, token_count);
4612 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "COMPAT") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "COMPATIBILITY") == 0) {
4613 compatibilityCommand(tokens, token_count);
4614 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "PORT") == 0) {
4615 portCommand(tokens, token_count);
4616 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "TARGET") == 0) {
4617 targetCommand(tokens, token_count);
4618 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "MONITOR") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "MON") == 0) {
4619 monitorCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr);
4620 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "RW") == 0) {
4621 readWordsCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr, token_count > 2 ? tokens[2] : nullptr);
4622 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "WW") == 0) {
4623 writeWordsCommand(tokens, token_count);
4624 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "ROW") == 0) {
4625 readOneWordCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr);
4626 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "WOW") == 0) {
4627 writeOneWordCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr, token_count > 2 ? tokens[2] : nullptr);
4628 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "RB") == 0) {
4629 readBitCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr);
4630 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "WB") == 0) {
4631 writeBitCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr, token_count > 2 ? tokens[2] : nullptr);
4632 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "RBITS") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "RBS") == 0) {
4633 readBitsCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr, token_count > 2 ? tokens[2] : nullptr);
4634 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "WBITS") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "WBS") == 0) {
4635 writeBitsCommand(tokens, token_count);
4636 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "RDW") == 0) {
4637 readDWordsCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr, token_count > 2 ? tokens[2] : nullptr);
4638 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "WDW") == 0) {
4639 writeDWordsCommand(tokens, token_count);
4640 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "ROD") == 0) {
4641 readOneDWordCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr);
4642 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "WOD") == 0) {
4643 writeOneDWordCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr, token_count > 2 ? tokens[2] : nullptr);
4644 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "RR") == 0) {
4645 readRandomCommand(tokens, token_count);
4646 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "WRAND") == 0) {
4647 writeRandomWordsCommand(tokens, token_count);
4648 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "WRANDB") == 0) {
4649 writeRandomBitsCommand(tokens, token_count);
4650 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "RBLK") == 0) {
4651 readBlockCommand(tokens, token_count);
4652 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "WBLK") == 0) {
4653 writeBlockCommand(tokens, token_count);
4654 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "UNLOCK") == 0) {
4655 remotePasswordUnlockCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr);
4656 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "LOCK") == 0) {
4657 remotePasswordLockCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr);
4658 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "VERIFYW") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "VW") == 0) {
4659 verifyWordsCommand(tokens, token_count);
4660 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "VERIFYB") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "VB") == 0) {
4661 verifyBitCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr, token_count > 2 ? tokens[2] : nullptr);
4662 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "PENDING") == 0) {
4663 printVerificationSummary();
4664 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "JUDGE") == 0) {
4665 judgeCommand(tokens, token_count);
4666 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "TIMEOUT") == 0) {
4667 setTimeoutCommand(token_count > 1 ? tokens[1] : nullptr);
4668 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "FUNCHECK") == 0) {
4669 funcheckCommand(tokens, token_count);
4670 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "ENDURANCE") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "SOAK") == 0) {
4671 enduranceCommand(tokens, token_count);
4672 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "RECONNECT") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "RETRY") == 0) {
4673 reconnectCommand(tokens, token_count);
4674 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "TXLIMIT") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "TXBUF") == 0) {
4675 txlimitCommand(tokens, token_count);
4676 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "BENCH") == 0 || strcmp(tokens[0], "PERF") == 0) {
4677 stopEndurance(false, false);
4678 stopReconnect(false);
4679 benchCommand(tokens, token_count);
4680 } else if (strcmp(tokens[0], "DUMP") == 0) {
4681 printLastFrames();
4682 } else {
4683 Serial.print("unknown command: ");
4684 Serial.println(tokens[0]);
4685 printHelp();
4686 }
4687
4688 printPrompt();
4689}
4690
4691void runStartupDemo() {
4692 if (!connectPlc(false)) {
4693 Serial.println("startup read skipped: plc not connected");
4694 return;
4695 }
4696
4697 printTypeName();
4698 readWordsCommand(const_cast<char*>("D100"), const_cast<char*>("2"));
4699}
4700
4701void setup() {
4702 Serial.begin(115200);
4703 while (!Serial) {
4704 delay(10);
4705 }
4706
4707 Serial.println("SLMP W6300-EVB-Pico2 serial debug console");
4708 plc.setFrameType(console_link.frame_type);
4709 plc.setTimeoutMs(2000);
4710
4711#ifdef LED_BUILTIN
4712 pinMode(LED_BUILTIN, OUTPUT);
4713 led_ready = true;
4714#endif
4715
4716 (void)bringUpEthernet();
4717 printHelp();
4718 Serial.print("transport=");
4719 Serial.println(transportModeText(console_link.transport_mode));
4720 Serial.print("frame=");
4721 Serial.println(frameTypeText(console_link.frame_type));
4722 runStartupDemo();
4723 printPrompt();
4724}
4725
4726void loop() {
4727 pollBoardSwitch();
4728 applyLedState();
4729 pollEnduranceTest();
4730 pollReconnectTest();
4731 while (Serial.available() > 0) {
4732 const int raw = Serial.read();
4733 if (raw < 0) {
4734 break;
4735 }
4736
4737 const char ch = static_cast<char>(raw);
4738 if (ch == '\r') {
4739 continue;
4740 }
4741
4742 if (ch == '\n') {
4743 serial_line[serial_line_length] = '\0';
4744 handleCommand(serial_line);
4745 serial_line_length = 0;
4746 serial_line[0] = '\0';
4747 continue;
4748 }
4749
4750 if (serial_line_length + 1 >= sizeof(serial_line)) {
4751 Serial.println();
4752 Serial.println("command too long");
4753 serial_line_length = 0;
4754 serial_line[0] = '\0';
4755 printPrompt();
4756 continue;
4757 }
4758
4759 serial_line[serial_line_length++] = ch;
4760 }
4761}
4762
4763} // namespace w6300_evb_pico2_serial_console
